Die Dampfstoßfunktion kann zur vorübergehenden Erhöhung der Leistungsabgabe genutzt werden, erfordert danach jedoch eine längere Abkühlphase. Dieser Generator erzeugt auch während einer Sonneneruption weiterhin Strom. Darüber hinaus besteht die Möglichkeit, die internen Komponenten zu kalibrieren, wodurch der Wartungsbedarf des Geräts dauerhaft gesenkt wird. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die uralt ARC-Generatoren studiert haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_HeatPowered.label: wärmebetriebenes ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_SteamPowered.description: Die dampfbetriebene fortschrittliche Reaktorkammer, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom aus geothermischen Dampfgeysiren. Der Motor erfordert regelmäßige Wartung, und wenn diese nicht durchgeführt wird, kann dies zu einem schwerwiegenden Ausfall der ARC-Komponenten führen. Im Gegensatz zu anderen ARCs kann diese Variante jedoch von jedem gepflegt werden, auch von denen, die sich nicht mit den uralt-Generatoren beschäftigt haben. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Der Druck kann angepasst werden, um den Wartungsbedarf auf Kosten eines geringeren Stromverbrauchs zu reduzieren. Es besteht die Möglichkeit, den Wirkungsgrad des ARC zu kalibrieren, um die erzeugte Leistung dauerhaft zu steigern. Die Dampfstoßfunktion kann zur vorübergehenden Erhöhung der Leistungsabgabe genutzt werden, erfordert danach jedoch eine längere Abkühlphase. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die uralt ARC-Generatoren studiert haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_SteamPowered.label: dampfbetriebener ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ThermalVent.description: Die Thermal-Vent Advanced Reactor Chamber, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom aus geothermischen Dampfgeysiren. Der Motor erfordert eine regelmäßige Wartung, und wenn diese nicht durchgeführt wird, kann es zu einer geringfügigen Panne kommen, für deren Reparatur nur normale Komponenten erforderlich sind. Im Gegensatz zu anderen ARCs kann diese Variante jedoch von jedem gepflegt werden, auch von denen, die sich nicht mit den uralt-Generatoren beschäftigt haben. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Der Druck kann angepasst werden, um den Wartungsbedarf auf Kosten eines geringeren Stromverbrauchs zu reduzieren. Es besteht die Möglichkeit, den Wirkungsgrad des ARC zu kalibrieren, um die erzeugte Leistung dauerhaft zu steigern. Die Dampfstoßfunktion kann zur vorübergehenden Erhöhung der Leistungsabgabe genutzt werden, erfordert danach jedoch eine längere Abkühlphase. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die uralt ARC-Generatoren studiert haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_ThermalVent.label: Thermal-Vent ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.description: Ein alt, verrostetes Fragment eines ARC. Es wurde wahrscheinlich aufgegeben, als das Bauprojekt gestoppt wurde. Es könnte möglich sein, es zu zerlegen, um einige wertvolle ARC-Komponenten zu erhalten.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.label: uralt ARC-Teil
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_One.description: Ein verrosteter Rahmen eines alt Stromgenerators, unvollständig und kaum noch zusammenzuhalten. Die meisten seiner Teile sind längst verschwunden, geplündert oder im Laufe der Zeit zerstört. Was übrig bleibt, ist kaum mehr als Schrott, ohne Hoffnung auf Wiederherstellung. Vielleicht könnte Ihnen die Untersuchung des Gebiets dabei helfen, den Standort eines weiteren Prototyps zu finden.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_One.label: Prototyp
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Three.descriptio: Ein fast vollständiger Generator, der aufgegeben wurde, bevor er jemals funktionieren konnte. Die Struktur ist stabiler, aber ihr Inneres ist zerstört – Rost, fehlende Teile und starke Bewuchs machen sie unbrauchbar. Es können nur noch wenige Materialien geborgen werden, aber unter ihnen sind möglicherweise einige ARC-Komponenten zu finden. Vielleicht könnte Ihnen die Untersuchung des Gebiets dabei helfen, den Standort eines weiteren Prototyps zu finden.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Three.label: Prototyp
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Two.description: Ein verlassener Generator. Seine Maschinerie ist etwas intakter, aber immer noch nutzlos. Zerbrochene Paneele, gerissene Drähte und starker Rost zeigen, dass es nie fertiggestellt wurde. Es ist überwuchert und vergessen und bietet nur noch wenige zu rettende Teile. Vielleicht könnte Ihnen die Untersuchung des Gebiets dabei helfen, den Standort eines weiteren Prototyps zu finden.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPrototype_Two.label: Prototyp
LanguageData.VQE_AncientChainlinkFence.description: Ein uralt Zaun aus verstärkten Metallpfosten, die durch verrostete Kettenglieder verbunden sind.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientChainlinkFence.label: uralt Maschendrahtzaun
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionCrane.description: Ein verrostetes, überwuchertes Wrack eines großen Baukrans. Alles, was nicht verrostet ist, wurde längst geplündert. Solche Kräne hätten zum Bau der großen ARC-Generatoren verwendet werden können, aber dieses Wrack kann aufgrund kaputter Maschinen nicht mehr für irgendetwas genutzt werden.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionCrane.label: uralt Baukran
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionTruck.description: Ein verrostetes, überwuchertes Wrack eines großen Baulastwagens. Alles, was nicht verrostet ist, wurde längst geplündert. Es wurde höchstwahrscheinlich beim Bau eines ARC-Generators verwendet, gemessen an den noch vorhandenen Hüllen einer großen Generatoreinheit, die auf der Rückseite festgeschnallt sind.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientConstructionTruck.label: uralt Bauwagen
LanguageData.VQE_AncientDigger.description: Ein verrostetes, überwuchertes Wrack eines großen Baggers. Alles, was nicht verrostet ist, wurde längst geplündert. Ein Bagger dieser Größe hätte verwendet werden können, um das Gelände für den Bau eines ARC-Generators vorzubereiten, aber dieser ist in einem sehr schlechten Zustand.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientDigger.label: uralt Bagger
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGenetron.description: Ein Ruinee Prototyp eines ARC, Ruineedurch Zeit und mangelnde Wartung beschädigt. Der größte Teil der wichtigen Maschinen wurde vor langer Zeit geplündert, was jegliche Restaurierungsversuche vereitelt. Allerdings kann die Dekonstruktion immer noch wertvolle Komponenten hervorbringen, die für den Bau eines brandneuen ARC nützlich sind. Dieser Ruinee Ruinee kann studiert werden, um zu lernen, wie man einen ARC erstellt und verwaltet.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGenetron.label: uralt ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGeothermalGenetron.descriptio: Ein Ruinee geothermischer ARC, Ruineedurch Zeit und mangelnde Wartung beschädigt. Der größte Teil der wichtigen Maschinen wurde vor langer Zeit geplündert, was jegliche Restaurierungsversuche vereitelt. Allerdings kann die Dekonstruktion immer noch wertvolle Komponenten hervorbringen, die für den Bau eines brandneuen ARC nützlich sind. Dieser Ruinee Ruinee kann untersucht werden, um zu lernen, wie man einen geothermischen ARC baut.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientGeothermalGenetron.label: uralt geothermischer ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientOvergrownGenetron.description: Ein mysteriöser, uralt, überwucherter ARC. Es scheint eher wie ein funktionierender Prototyp als wie ein fertiges Produkt auszusehen, das jetzt vollständig mit Brombeersträuchern und Altersspuren bedeckt ist. Irgendwie ist es trotz seines Alters immer noch in Betrieb und erzeugt ausreichend Strom für die umliegenden Stromnetze. Jegliche Manipulation führt zwangsläufig zu irreversiblen Schäden, es ist jedoch möglich, einige ARC-Komponenten daraus zu extrahieren.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientOvergrownGenetron.label: experimentelles ARC
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles.description: Ein alt, verrosteter Aktenschrank mit faltern mit Forschungsnotizen zum Bau eines ARC-Generators.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles.label: uralt Forschungsdateien
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles_Off.description: Ein uralt, verrosteter Aktenschrank. Es ist völlig leer.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchFiles_Off.label: uralt Aktenschrank
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal.description: Ein uralt Computerterminal. Es kann verwendet werden, um auf Forschungsnotizen im Zusammenhang mit einer ARC-Generatoreinheit zuzugreifen.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal.label: Forschungsterminal
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Cracked.desc: Ein uralt Computerterminal. Der Bildschirm ist gesprungen und alle wertvollen Bestandteile wurden entfernt.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Off.descript: Ein uralt Computerterminal. Es ist vom Strom getrennt oder funktioniert einfach nicht.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientResearchTerminal_Off.label: uralt Forschungsterminal
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Boxes.description: Eine verrostete Baupalette mit einem Stapel alt, verrosteten Stahlkisten. Alles Wertvolle wurde schon vor langer Zeit entfernt.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Boxes.label: Baupalette mit Kisten
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Chemfuel.descript: Eine verrostete Baupalette mit einem Stapel unbenutzter Chemiekanister. Kann geborgen werden, um etwas chemischen Treibstoff zurückzugewinnen.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Chemfuel.label: Baupalette mit Kanistern
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Components.descri: Eine verrostete Baupalette mit einem großen Container mit verschrotteten Bauteilen darauf. Kann durchsucht werden, um einige Industriekomponenten zu bergen.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Components.label: Baupalette mit Bauteilen
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Scrap.description: Eine verrostete Baupalette mit einem großen Schrottcontainer darauf. Kann durchsucht werden, um etwas Stahl zu bergen.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Scrap.label: Baupalette mit Schrott
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Wood.description: Eine verrostete Baupalette mit einem großen Stapel verrottendem Holz. Daraus lässt sich etwas trockeneres Holz gewinnen.
LanguageData.VQE_ConstructionPallet_Wood.label: Baupalette mit Holz
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyConstructionPallet.description: Eine verrostete Baupalette. Es ist leer.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyConstructionPallet.label: leere Baupalette
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart.description: Eine bizarre Maschine, die für einen großen Generator konzipiert wurde. Da es mit einer Plane abgedeckt war, ist es relativ intakt. Es kann untersucht werden, um Erkenntnisse über die ARC-Generatoreinheit zu gewinnen, die dabei helfen können, die vom Erfinder hinterlassenen Forschungsdaten uralt zu entschlüsseln. Es könnte möglich sein, es zu zerlegen, um einige wertvolle ARC-Komponenten zu erhalten.
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart.label: experimenteller ARC-Teil
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart_Studied.descript: Eine bizarre Maschine, die für einen großen Generator konzipiert wurde. Wie Sie bereits gesehen haben, kann es in Einzelteile zerlegt werden.
LanguageData.VQE_ExperimentalARCPart_Studied.label: studierte den experimentellen ARC-Teil
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.description: Ein verdrehtes Stück eines ARC. Wertvolle Teile fehlen, alles andere wird zur Nutzlosigkeit degradiert.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.label: ARC-Müll
LanguageData.VQE_NuclearGenetronHusk.description: Eine Ruineeed Hülle eines nuklearen ARC. Mangelnde Wartung oder andere unvorhergesehene Krisen haben zu einer verheerenden Detonation geführt, die das Metall in etwas völlig Unbrauchbares verwandelt hat. Diese Hülle kann untersucht werden, um zu lernen, wie man ein nukleares ARC baut und instandhält, sie kann aber auch dekonstruiert werden, um einige Ressourcen zurückzugewinnen.
LanguageData.VQE_NuclearGenetronHusk.label: nukleare ARC-Hülle
LanguageData.VQE_OvergrownCryptosleepCasket.descripti: Dieser Kryptoschlaf-Sarg ist mit Brombeersträuchern bewachsen und sieht aus, als stünde er schon sehr lange hier. Wer weiß, was darin enthalten sein könnte?
LanguageData.VQE_OvergrownCryptosleepCasket.label: Kryptoschlaf-Schatulle
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Atomic.description: Die Atomic Advanced Reactor Chamber, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom durch eine Reaktion, die auftritt, wenn Uran im Kern zerfällt. Je mehr Uran im Kern vorhanden ist, desto schneller zerfällt es, erzeugt aber auch mehr Energie. Sollte das Uran jemals zur Neige gehen, wird der Reaktor abgeschaltet und muss zum Neustart mit einer großen Menge Uran nachgefüllt werden. Mit jeder zerlegten Uraneinheit erfährt der Kern einen Verschleiß und muss kontinuierlich gewartet werden, da ein Fehlen davon zu einer katastrophalen nuklearen Detonation führen würde. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Es kann in einen Overdrive-Modus versetzt werden, der mehr Kraftstoff verbraucht, aber mehr Leistung erzeugt. Auch Brennstäbe können so kalibriert werden, dass die Geschwindigkeit des Uranzerfalls dauerhaft verringert wird. Dieser Reaktor kann in einem von zwei Modi betrieben werden: im einfachen Sicherheitsmodus oder im Gefahrenmodus, in dem der Wartungsaufwand durch den Abbau von Uran nicht sinkt, aber Strahlung aus dem Kern austritt und jeden in einem großen Umkreis betrifft. Darüber hinaus sind Notabschaltsysteme vorhanden, die es ermöglichen, den Reaktor jederzeit anzuhalten, um eine kritische Kernschmelze zu verhindern. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die Hülle eines nuklearen ARC-Generators untersucht haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Atomic.label: atomares ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Isotopic.description: Isotopic Advanced Reactor Chamber, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom durch eine Reaktion, die auftritt, wenn Uran im Kern zerfällt. Je mehr Uran im Kern vorhanden ist, desto schneller zerfällt es, erzeugt aber auch mehr Energie. Sollte das Uran jemals zur Neige gehen, wird der Reaktor abgeschaltet und muss zum Neustart mit einer großen Menge Uran nachgefüllt werden. Mit jeder zerlegten Uraneinheit erfährt der Kern einen Verschleiß und muss kontinuierlich gewartet werden, da ein Fehlen davon zu einer katastrophalen nuklearen Detonation führen würde. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Es kann in einen Overdrive-Modus versetzt werden, der mehr Kraftstoff verbraucht, aber mehr Leistung erzeugt. Auch Brennstäbe können so kalibriert werden, dass die Geschwindigkeit des Uranzerfalls dauerhaft verringert wird. Dieser Reaktor kann in einem von zwei Modi betrieben werden: im einfachen Sicherheitsmodus oder im Gefahrenmodus, in dem der Wartungsaufwand durch den Abbau von Uran nicht sinkt, aber Strahlung aus dem Kern austritt und jeden in einem großen Umkreis betrifft. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die Hülle eines nuklearen ARC-Generators untersucht haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Isotopic.label: Isotope ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Nuclear.description: Die Nuclear Advanced Reactor Chamber, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom durch eine Reaktion, die auftritt, wenn Uran im Kern zerfällt. Je mehr Uran im Kern vorhanden ist, desto schneller zerfällt es, erzeugt aber auch mehr Energie. Sollte das Uran jemals zur Neige gehen, wird der Reaktor abgeschaltet und muss zum Neustart mit einer großen Menge Uran nachgefüllt werden. Mit jeder zerlegten Uraneinheit erfährt der Kern einen Verschleiß und muss kontinuierlich gewartet werden, da ein Fehlen davon zu einer katastrophalen nuklearen Detonation führen würde. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Es kann in einen Overdrive-Modus versetzt werden, der mehr Kraftstoff verbraucht, aber mehr Leistung erzeugt. Auch Brennstäbe können so kalibriert werden, dass die Geschwindigkeit des Uranzerfalls dauerhaft verringert wird. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die Hülle eines nuklearen ARC-Generators untersucht haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Nuclear.label: nukleare ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_UraniumPowered.description: Die mit Uran betriebene fortschrittliche Reaktorkammer, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom durch eine Reaktion, die auftritt, wenn Uran im Kern zerfällt. Je mehr Uran im Kern vorhanden ist, desto schneller zerfällt es, erzeugt aber auch mehr Energie. Sollte das Uran jemals zur Neige gehen, wird der Reaktor abgeschaltet und muss zum Neustart mit einer großen Menge Uran nachgefüllt werden. Mit jeder zerlegten Uraneinheit erfährt der Kern einen Verschleiß und muss kontinuierlich gewartet werden, da ein Fehlen davon zu einer katastrophalen nuklearen Detonation führen würde. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Es kann in einen Overdrive-Modus versetzt werden, der mehr Kraftstoff verbraucht, aber mehr Leistung erzeugt. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die Hülle eines nuklearen ARC-Generators untersucht haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_UraniumPowered.label: Uranbetriebenes ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodBlasting.description: Die fortschrittliche Holzstrahlreaktorkammer, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom aus geothermischen Dampfgeysiren und Holz, das in einer Reihe großer Öfen verbrannt wird. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Es kann in einen Overdrive-Modus versetzt werden, der mehr Kraftstoff verbraucht, aber mehr Leistung erzeugt. Es kann auch abgestimmt werden, um die Stromerzeugung noch weiter zu steigern. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die uralt ARC-Generatoren studiert haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodBlasting.label: Holzstrahlen ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFired.description: Die holzbefeuerte fortschrittliche Reaktorkammer, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom aus geothermischen Dampfgeysiren und Holz, das in einer Reihe großer Öfen verbrannt wird. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die uralt ARC-Generatoren studiert haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFired.label: Holzbefeuerter ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFueled.description: Die holzbefeuerte fortschrittliche Reaktorkammer, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom aus geothermischen Dampfgeysiren und Holz, das in einer Reihe großer Öfen verbrannt wird. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die uralt ARC-Generatoren studiert haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFueled.label: holzbefeuerter ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodPowered.description: Die holzbetriebene fortschrittliche Reaktorkammer, kurz ARC, erzeugt Strom aus geothermischen Dampfgeysiren und Holz, das in einer Reihe großer Öfen verbrannt wird. Diese ursprünglich von {InventorFullName} entworfenen ARCs sind unglaublich selten, aber auch vielseitig und leistungsstark. Es handelt sich um einen fortschrittlichen Generatortyp, der aufgerüstet werden kann, um andere Kraftstoffarten zu akzeptieren und so leistungsstarke neue Fähigkeiten freizuschalten. Es kann in einen Overdrive-Modus versetzt werden, der mehr Kraftstoff verbraucht, aber mehr Leistung erzeugt. Muss auf einem Dampfgeysir platziert werden und kann nur von Kolonisten gebaut und aufgerüstet werden, die die uralt ARC-Generatoren studiert haben.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodPowered.label: holzbetriebenes ARC
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronComponent.description: Komplexe Ansammlung uralt mechanischer Systeme, konstruiert mit Präzision und Wissen, das über das aktuelle technologische Verständnis hinausgeht. Die Fähigkeit, diese Komponenten zu replizieren, ist im Laufe der Generationen verloren gegangen, was sie selten und für den Bau der ARCs unerlässlich macht.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronComponent.label: ARC-Komponente
LanguageData.VFEM2_Mead.description: A drink akin to wine, made of fermented honey and water, aged in a simple barrel. This sweet, crisp drink is known be nursed over time and has a reputation of being particularly comforting. Consuming mead lowers psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Mead.label: mead
LanguageData.VFEM2_Wine.description: A large bottle of a strong alcoholic beverage that is made from fermented grapes. Excessive consumption can lead to alcohol blackouts and, over time, addiction. Consuming wine increases psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Wine.label: wine
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Cap.description: A sleek, feathered cap worn by skilled archers and woodland hunters. Its lightweight design keeps vision clear and focus sharp, making it easier to land precise shots.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Cap.label: cap
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Chaperon.description: A stylish and versatile hood with a wrapped tail, favored by diplomats and merchants. It lends an air of authority, subtly improving negotiation skills.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Chaperon.label: chaperon
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameHat.description: A beautiful long cone hat for a dame.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameHat.label: dame hat
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherHelmet.descrip: A strong medieval helmet that provides full-head coverage. While it offers fantastic protection, one's vision is greatly obscured, thus it is only recommended for front line infantry, particularly those foregoing shields.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherHelmet.label: heavy leather helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterHat.description: A hat worthy of a jester. Each half is different from the other one in color.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterHat.label: jester hat
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsCrown.description: A beautiful metal crown. The wearer becomes very influential, but at the same time they will refuse to do any work.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsCrown.label: king's crown
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherHelmet.description: A simple leather helmet designed to not block ones communication during combat. Often worn by front line, shield-wielding infantry to soak damage.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherHelmet.label: leather helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedHelmet.description: A simple leather helmet designed to not block one's communication during combat. Often worn by front line, shield-wielding infantry to soak damage.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedHelmet.label: padded helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlagueMask.description: A mask with a long ‘beak’ filled with herbal medicine that keeps infected pawns at a distance.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlagueMask.label: plague mask
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateHelmetHeavy.descripti: A bulky medieval helmet that provides full-head coverage. Offers a considerable amount of protection but restricts the wearer's field of vision.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateHelmetHeavy.label: heavy plate helmet
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_TorchBelt.description: A belt with a number of wooden torches strapped to it. They can be lit up and thrown to set things ablaze. Can be refueled with wood.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_TorchBelt.label: torch belt
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_TorchBelt.verbs.0.label: throw torch
LanguageData.VFEM2_Proj_GrenadeTorch.label: thrown torch
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameDress.description: A beautiful full body dress for a dame. Wearing such clothes will inevitably lead to getting used to luxury, so the user will not be capable of dumb labor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_DameDress.label: dame dress
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherArmor.descript: A heavy leather breastplate meant to provide warmth and protection to heavy infantry during battles in frigid tundras. Unfortunately, this armor leaves one slowed and more vulnerable to melee attacks.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_HeavyLeatherArmor.label: heavy leather armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterOutfit.description: A colorful jester outfit. It predisposes to conversation, but it's impossible to learn anything in such a suit.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_JesterOutfit.label: jester outfit
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsRobes.description: A long robe with galten chestplate, worthy of a king. Extremely beautiful.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_KingsRobes.label: king’s robes
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherArmor.description: This armor is made much more carefully and tightly out of processed leathers, sacrificing some insulation in favor of extra protection against damage. Intended to be worn by front-line troops and often accompanied by a shield.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_LeatherArmor.label: leather armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Mantle.description: A light cloak covering shoulders and neck, providing some protection from the elements.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Mantle.label: mantle
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedArmor.description: A thick, quilted garment designed to absorb impacts and provide moderate protection. Often used by foot saltiers or worn under heavier armor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PaddedArmor.label: padded armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateArmorHeavy.descriptio: Overlapping solid plates of armor covering the entire body from neck to feet. The plates have been reinforced which offers significantly more protection, but at the cost of mobility.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_PlateArmorHeavy.label: heavy plate armor
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Tabard.description: A sleeveless cloth overgarment worn over armor or clothing, designed to display the wearer's heraldry. Though it provides no protection, it proudly showcases the colors and symbol of their allegiance.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apparel_Tabard.label: tabard
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apiary.description: A wooden box-like structure with a series of shelves, lattices, and chambers. When placed near flowers the apiary will naturally attract wild bees which will make it their new home. Over time these bees will produce honey which can be harvested and eaten directly, or later fermented into mead.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Apiary.label: apiary
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleDoor.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleDoor.label: castle door (medium)
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleGate.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks, with a latticed grille protecting the passage. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function. Castle gates take a long time to open.
LanguageData.VFEM2_2x1CastleGate.label: castle gate (medium)
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleDoor.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleDoor.label: castle door (large)
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleGate.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks, with a latticed grille protecting the passage. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function. Castle gates take a long time to open.
LanguageData.VFEM2_3x1CastleGate.label: castle gate (large)
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleDoor.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleDoor.label: castle door (grand)
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleGate.description: An incredibly resistant door made out of oversized stone blocks, with a latticed grille protecting the passage. Very slow to build. It’s a good choice if you want to keep the enemies out - or in. The door requires walls on either side to function. Castle gates take a long time to open.
LanguageData.VFEM2_4x1CastleGate.label: castle gate (grand)
LanguageData.VFEM2_AutofillShelf.description: A triple-stack shelf that halts three times as much as empty ground. Items stored inside will never deteriorate and don't affect the beauty of their surroundings.\n\nSince shelf space is limited, shelves cannot halt chunks, buildings, plants and large corpses.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AutofillShelf.label: shelf
LanguageData.VFEM2_DoubleFurBed.description: A two-person, wood-framed bed stuffed with dried grasses and covered in a variety of pelts and furs to provide extra insulation during frigid nights. The warmth of this bed counters hypothermia.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DoubleFurBed.label: double fur bed
LanguageData.VFEM2_FurBed.description: A wood-framed bed stuffed with dried grasses and covered in a variety of pelts and furs to provide extra insulation during frigid nights. The warmth of this bed counters hypothermia.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FurBed.label: fur bed
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hearth.description: A large, tightly packed fire pit capable of halting high amounts of wood at once. Provides hefty warmth and light to thronerooms and halls alike and acts as a gathering spot for idle colonists.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hearth.label: hearth
LanguageData.VFEM2_StandingBanner.description: A tall fabric banner mounted on a sturdy wooden frame, proudly displaying the heraldry of the faction.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StandingBanner.label: heraldic standing banner
LanguageData.VFEM2_HearthDarklight.description: A large, tightly packed fire pit capable of halting high amounts of wood at once. Provides hefty warmth and light to thronerooms and halls alike and acts as a gathering spot for idle colonists.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HearthDarklight.label: darklight hearth
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArcheryTarget.description: A simple archery target mounted on a wooden stand. It's relaxing, and allows oneself to test their accuracy and train over time without risking fatal confrontation.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArcheryTarget.label: Bogenschießen-Ziel
LanguageData.VFEM2_TrainingDummy.description: A target dummy made out of wood, soil, and dried plant matter. Surprisingly durable, allows oneself to test their swordsmanship and train over time without risking fatal confrontation.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TrainingDummy.label: Trainingspuppe
LanguageData.VFEM2_LeatherBoilpot.description: A wood-fueled metal pot used to boil patchleather. Consumes wood when working.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LeatherBoilpot.label: leather boilpot
LanguageData.VFEM2_AilmentsShelf.description: A sEinkaufszentrum wooden cabinet that can be stocked with herbal remedies, tinctures, and basic medicinal tools. Items stored inside will never deteriorate and don't affect the beauty of their surroundings.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AilmentsShelf.label: ailment's shelf
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArtToolStand.description: A rack with chisels, hammers, and other carving tools. Increases work speed when placed near an art bench. One workbench can only use one tool stand.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArtToolStand.label: art tool stand
LanguageData.VFEM2_CarvingBoard.description: A thick, well-worn wooden board that allows for precision cuts. Increases work speed when placed near a butchering table. The sharp blades allow the butcher to extract 10% more meat and leather from any butchered creature. One workbench can only use one carving board.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CarvingBoard.label: carving board
LanguageData.VFEM2_ChiselRack.description: A sEinkaufszentrum rack filled with various chisels. Increases work speed when placed near a stonecutter’s table. One workbench can only use one chisel rack.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ChiselRack.label: chisel rack
LanguageData.VFEM2_CleaverRack.description: A sturdy rack halting sharp cleavers and knives. Increases work speed when placed near a butchering table. One workbench can only use one cleaver rack.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CleaverRack.label: cleaver rack
LanguageData.VFEM2_ForgeBellows.description: A manually operated bellows that boosts airflow to the smithy. Increases work speed when placed near a smithy. Bellows reduce the fuel consumption of the linked workbench by 20%. One workbench can only use one bellows.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ForgeBellows.label: forge bellows
LanguageData.VFEM2_MannequinStand.description: A basic mannequin used to measure and shape garments for more refined results. Increases work speed when placed near a tailoring bench. Mannequin stand allows for more precise measurements, reducing the cost of crafting apparel by 10%. One workbench can only use one mannequin.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MannequinStand.label: mannequin stand
LanguageData.VFEM2_NotesStack.description: A sEinkaufszentrum desk stocked with numerous notes and pieces of paper. Increases work speed when placed near a research bench. One workbench can only use one notes stack.
LanguageData.VFEM2_NotesStack.label: notes stack
LanguageData.VFEM2_ResearchBoard.description: A slate or chalkboard for sketching diagrams and sharing ideas. Increases work speed when placed near a research bench. Up to two research benches can be linked to one chalkboard.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ResearchBoard.label: research board
LanguageData.VFEM2_SmithingAnvil.description: A heavy steel anvil used to shape metalwork with greater precision. Increases work speed when placed near a smithy. Items of awful and poor quality crafted on the linked workbench have a chance of being upgraded by one quality level. One workbench can only use one anvil.
LanguageData.VFEM2_SmithingAnvil.label: smithing anvil
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneClamp.description: A simple clamp for halting large stones in place. Increases work speed when placed near a stonecutter’s table. The clamp allows higher productivity, increasing resource yield from all recipes by 10%. One workbench can only use one stone clamp.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneClamp.label: stone clamp
LanguageData.VFEM2_StonePolisher.description: A polishing wheel that ensures sculptures have a smooth and refined finish. Increases work speed when placed near an art bench. Stone sculptures of awful and poor quality crafted on the linked art bench have a high chance of being upgraded by one quality level One workbench can only use one stone polisher.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StonePolisher.label: stone polisher
LanguageData.VFEM2_SurgicalTools.description: A salt stand halting scalpels, clamps, and bone saws. Increases work speed when placed near a bed of any kind, including sleeping spots and hospital beds. One bed can only use one set of surgical tools.
LanguageData.VFEM2_SurgicalTools.label: surgical tools
LanguageData.VFEM2_TailoringLoom.description: A sEinkaufszentrum loom for weaving thread. Increases work speed when placed near a tailoring bench. One workbench can only use one tailoring loom.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TailoringLoom.label: tailoring loom
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadFermentingBarrel.description: A very simple barrel, held together with a series of mortise and tenon joints. Can turn honey into mead.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeadFermentingBarrel.label: mead fermenting barrel
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench.description: A wood-fueled station for brewing various alchemical draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench.label: fueled draught lab
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench_Electric.descr: An electrically-powered station for brewing various alchemical draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench_Electric.label: electric draught lab
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bolt_ArbalestTurret.label: arbalest bolt
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArbalestTurret.description: A stationary heavy arbalest mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. While reload speed leaves a lot to be desired, arbalest has an extremely long range, provided there is line of sight on the target.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArbalestTurret.label: arbalest
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArquebusTurret.description: A stationary arquebus mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. Because of the added stability, the wall-mounted arquebus can fire much further than normal. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_ArquebusTurret.label: arquebus
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArbalest.descrip: A stationary heavy arbalest mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. While reload speed leaves a lot to be desired, arbalest has an extremely long range, provided there is line of sight on the target.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArbalest.label: wall-mounted arbalest
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArquebus.descrip: A stationary arquebus mounted on a low castle wall to grant cover. Because of the added stability, the wall-mounted arquebus can fire much further than normal. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Turret_WallMountedArquebus.label: wall-mounted arquebus
LanguageData.VFEM2_CastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant impassable wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Capable of halting a roof. If castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a chest-high passable cover that when repaired, turns into an impassable wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CastleWall.label: castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClothWall.description: An impassable wall made out of thick overlapping strips of fabric or leather stitched together. Quick to build, but extremely flammable. When deconstructed, returns all of the cloth used.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClothWall.label: cloth wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedCastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant impassable wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Capable of halting a roof. If castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a chest-high passable cover that when repaired, turns into an impassable wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedCastleWall.label: damaged castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedLowCastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant chest-high wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Incapable of halting a roof. If low castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a very low but standable cover that when repaired, turns into the chest-high wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_DamagedLowCastleWall.label: damaged low castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_LowCastleWall.description: An incredibly resistant chest-high wall made out of oversized stone blocks. Very slow to build. Incapable of halting a roof. If low castle wall sustains enough damage, it becomes a very low but standable cover that when repaired, turns into the chest-high wall again.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LowCastleWall.label: low castle wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_Palisade.description: An impassable fence made out of vertically-standing wooden stakes. Slow to build but requires little resources. Incapable of halting a roof.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Palisade.label: palisade
LanguageData.VFEM2_TimberedWall.description: An impassable wall made out of stone blocks and heavy, carefully fitted timbers forming a box frame. Slow to build but much more resistant to damage. Flammable, but less so than ordinary wooden walls. Capable of halting a roof.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TimberedWall.label: timbered wall
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineBarrel.description: A barrel for fermenting raw must into wine.
LanguageData.VFEM2_WineBarrel.label: wine barrel
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugBroad.description: A large decorative rug featuring a balt heraldic design, perfect for displaying allegiance or family pride in any room.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugBroad.label: heraldic rug (broad)
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugGrand.description: A massive decorative rug featuring a balt heraldic design, perfect for displaying allegiance or family pride in any room.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugGrand.label: heraldic rug (grand)
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugNarrow.description: A narrow decorative rug featuring a balt heraldic design, perfect for displaying allegiance or family pride in any room.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HeraldicRugNarrow.label: heraldic rug (narrow)
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Broad.description: A stone bas relief of viking imagery for decorating a floor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Broad.label: viking slab (broad)
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Medium.description: A stone bas relief of viking imagery for decorating a floor.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Viking_Slab_Medium.label: viking slab (medium)
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.description: A crystal-clear, white liquid. When the user drinks it, it causes them to rapidly lose their memory. This effect makes both negative and positive memories fade much quicker than normal, leading to a transient experience of life's events. While this can alleviate the burden of painful memories, it also diminishes the joy and learning gained from positive experiences.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.label: amnesia draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.description: A clear, vibrant teal liquid. When the user drinks it, it enhances their resistance to toxins, fortifying their body against harmful substances. Additionally, this draught actively works to remove any existing toxic buildup within the user’s system, purifying their body and preventing the detrimental effects of toxins.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AntitoxDraught.label: antitox draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.description: A deep indigo liquid. When the user drinks it, it induces a chemically controlled coma, significantly slowing down their metabolism. This state allows the body to conserve energy and potentially aid in healing processes under controlled conditions.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.label: coma draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.description: A slate-gray liquid that when drunk, enhances the user’s global work speed and reduces their energy depletion, allowing them to work faster and longer without feeling tired. However, the intense boost in productivity comes at a significant risk, increasing the chance of a heart attack due to the strain on the body. After the potion's effects diminish, the user experiences a sharp increase in the rate at which they become sleepy, necessitating immediate rest to recover.
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.label: efficiency draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.description: A gentle, rose-pink liquid. When the user drinks it, it artificially boosts their fertility, giving even those who are infertile a chance to conceive. This slight increase in fertility opens the possibility for individuals or couples struggling with infertility to become parents, focusing on enhancing natural reproductive processes.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.label: fertility draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.description: A crisp, energizing turquoise liquid that when drank, significantly enhances learning abilities of the user, enabling them to absorb and retain more information rapidly. Additionally, the draught increases the efficiency of eating and resting, allowing quicker nourishment and recovery. It also boosts the accumulation of psyfocus, enhancing mental clarity and psychic abilities. However, once the effects of the draught begin to fade, these enhancements reverse, leading to decreased learning capacity, slower eating and resting rates, and diminished psyfocus.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.label: focus draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.description: A vibrant red liquid. When the user drinks it, it greatly enhances their injury healing rate, speeding up the process of wound closure and tissue repair. This potion works by boosting the body’s natural healing mechanisms, making recovery from injuries much quicker.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.label: healing draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.description: An amber-colored drink with tiny particles floating in it that bolsters the immune system of anyone that drinks it. While it helps them fight off sickness better, the downside is that it makes the user feel much more tired after drinking it, as well as overall makes the user get sleepy much faster than usual. The effects of the draught are strongest immediately after consumption, and then slowly fade away over the following days.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.label: immunization draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.description: A radiant, galten-colored liquid. When the user drinks it, it provides them with mental clarity, sharpening their focus specifically on acquiring new knowledge in areas they are passionate about. However, the draught comes at the cost of diminished combat capabilities, as the user's attention is diverted away from physical prowess and towards intellectual pursuits.
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.label: inspiration draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.description: A pale blue liquid known as Painkiller Draught. When the user drinks it, it effectively reduces their sensation of pain, providing relief from discomfort and injuries. However, the sedative components of the draught also diminish the user's productivity and focus, making it harder to concentrate and complete tasks efficiently. This makes it suitable for recovery periods but less ideal when active mental or physical effort is required.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.label: painkiller draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.description: A dark, ominous green liquid. When consumed, it drastically reduces the user's consciousness, inducing a chemically forced coma. This state not only incapacitates the individual but also initiates a rapid decay of their organs. The effects of this draught are severe and irreversible, leading inevitably to death.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.label: poison draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.description: A deep, slate-gray liquid. When the user drinks it, their skin undergoes a dramatic transformation, thickening and hardening to resemble a built-in suit of armor. The entire epidermis becomes tough enough to resist burns, while jointed exterior keratin plates form over the body, including the head and face, providing additional protection. This formidable physical shield makes it extremely difficult to inflict physical harm on the user. However, the appearance of the plates and hardened skin significantly reduces the user's physical attractiveness, impacting their social interactions.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.label: stoneskin draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.description: A balt, deep red liquid. When the user drinks it, it significantly increases their physical strength, giving them the power to perform feats they noralty couldn't. However, the potion also raises the user's mental break threshalt, making them more prone to psychological stress. Additionally, the intense surge of strength increases the likelihood of conflicts, leading to a higher chance of social fights.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.label: strength draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.description: A dark, foreboding purple liquid. When the user drinks it, it induces severe pain, incapacitating them to the point where movement becomes impossible. For prisoners, this intense agony causes a rapid decline in their will to resist, breaking down any mental barriers they may have. In the case of slaves, the draught completely suppresses their spirit, leaving them entirely subdued. This potion is used with caution due to its extreme effects.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.label: torturer draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.description: A rich, crimson liquid crafted from concentrated hemogen packs. When the user drinks it, it enhances all traits and abilities tied to their hemogenic nature, boosting physical and mental capacities. Additionally, this draught replenishes the user's hemogen supply over time, maintaining their vitality and enhancing their overall function.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HemogenDraught.label: hemogen draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.description: A shimmering galten liquid. When the user drinks it, it significantly improves their immunity gain speed, enhancing their body's natural defenses against diseases and infections. Additionally, this draught boosts the user's consciousness and movement speed, sharpening their mental alertness and enhancing their physical agility. Upon consumption, it also lowers the progress of any ongoing infections by 5%.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RoyalJellyDraught.label: royal jelly draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.description: A light blue liquid that’s sparkling with a subtle effervescence. When the user drinks it, it restores some of their psychic focus and enhances their psychic sensitivity, allowing for clearer mental processing and heightened awareness. However, this increased mental activity significantly raises the user's hunger rate, making them need to eat more often. Additionally, the relentless mental buzz from the draught leads to a noticeable drop in mood due to the overwhelming flow of thoughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ClarityDraught.label: clarity draught
LanguageData.VFEM2_Sweetroll.description: A baked treat made of an eggy bread base drizzled with a thick, sweetened glaze. Any trader selling these should be immediately concerned, as sweetrolls have a knack for being stolen.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Sweetroll.label: sweetroll
LanguageData.VFEM2_Must.description: Un-fermented wine. This substance needs to ferment in a wine barrel before it becomes drinkable wine.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Must.label: grape must
LanguageData.VFEM2_Honey.description: Raw, unprocessed honey harvested from an apiary, very sugary and fun to eat while also extremely long-lasting, perfect for taking on caravan trips, fermenting into mead, or baking into desserts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Honey.label: raw honey
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlocasiaLeaves.description: Extremely broad leaves of a plant that’s a commonly-recognized signifier of tropical forests. Alocasia leaves have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlocasiaLeaves.label: alocasia leaves
LanguageData.VFEM2_AstragalusFlowers.description: SEinkaufszentrum perennial wildflowers that grow in alpine climates. Astragalus flowers have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AstragalusFlowers.label: astragalus flowers
LanguageData.VFEM2_CliviaPetals.description: Petals of an unusual plant with tall, pretty flowers, called ‘bush lily’ by some. Clivia petals have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_CliviaPetals.label: clivia petals
LanguageData.VFEM2_RafflesiaLeaves.description: Giant petals of the rafflesia flower. Smell like rotting flesh and are very likely to cause food poisoning when consumed raw. Rafflesia petals have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RafflesiaLeaves.label: rafflesia petals
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGlowstool.description: Raw glowstool fungus obtained by harvesting glowstools growing in caves. Raw glowstool have been used by medieval civilizations in creation of different draughts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGlowstool.label: raw glowstool
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGrapes.description: Raw grapes. Nice to eat, even when raw. Grapes can also be made into must which can then be used to make wine.
LanguageData.VFEM2_RawGrapes.label: Trauben
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hardweave.description: Woven from smokeleaf, hardweave, sometimes called canvas, has threads alternated over and under adjacent threads to create a strong and even surface. Whilst not as insulating as cloth, it’s much more resistant to damage.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hardweave.label: hardweave
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hayweave.description: Made from woven haygrass, hayweave is a coarse and rough material, often used in desperate times for crafting rudimentary items. It provides minimal insulation and durability, making it a poor substitute for cloth, but it’s readily available and easy to produce.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Hayweave.label: hayweave
LanguageData.VFEM2_HardLeather.description: A hardened textile created from patchleather via the leather hardening process. It’s significantly harder and stronger than patchleather, but it’s still lacking in comparison to proper hard leather, such as rhinoceros or elephant hide.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HardLeather.label: hardleather
LanguageData.VFEM2_UnfinishedApparelNoStuff.descripti: An unfinished piece of an apparel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_UnfinishedApparelNoStuff.label: unfinished apparel
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.description: A brutal, uralt weapon of heavy knights, the claymore can be used cleave through enemies with ease.\n\nThis weapon has a chance to deal a critical strike, stunning the opponent.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.label: claymore
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.tools.0.label: handhaben
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.tools.1.label: Punkt
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Claymore.tools.2.label: Rand
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.description: A mighty weapon on the battlefield in the right kind of hands. Made to cut through flesh and bones alike. The axe edge extends into what's called horns, ideal for cutting through light armor and flesh alike.\n\nThis weapon has a chance to deal a critical strike, stunning the opponent.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.label: dane axe
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.tools.0.label: handhaben
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_DaneAxe.tools.1.label: Rand
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.description: A refined mace, with a spiked head connected to the handle with a chain, engineered for efficient swinging and deadly impacts. The randomness of the chain movement means that damage may fluctuate greatly.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.label: flail
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.tools.0.label: handhaben
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Flail.tools.1.label: Kopf
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.description: A long, unwieldy polearm with a sharp edge and a sharp point. The simple, uralt design concentrates cutting power generated from strong overhead swings. The reach of the halberd allows to strike enemies much further away.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.label: halberd
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.0.label: Welle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.1.label: Welle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.2.label: Punkt
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Halberd.tools.3.label: Rand
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_HeavyMace.description: A heavy mace consisting of a shaft and a heavy ball adorned with spikes. Very effective at piercing plate armor, this weapon is often used by more vicious knights and mercenaries.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_HeavyMace.label: heavy mace
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.description: A long, unwieldy polearm tipped with a sharp point for stabbing opponents. The reach of the pike allows to strike enemies much further away.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.label: pike
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.tools.0.label: Welle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.tools.1.label: Welle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Pike.tools.2.label: Punkt
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Shortsword.description: A versatile and compact blade designed for both thrusting and slashing. Its nimble design makes it effective in close-quarters combat, where quick strikes can overwhelm slower foes.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Shortsword.label: shortsword
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.description: A long wooden pole adorned with a flag bearing the heraldry of its bearer. While it inspires unity and bolsters morale as a rallying point for saltiers, the standard itself is poorly suited for combat, offering little in terms of offense or defense.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.label: heraldic standard
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.tools.0.label: Welle
LanguageData.VFEM2_MeleeWeapon_Standard.tools.1.label: Welle
LanguageData.VFEM2_Plant_Grape.description: A medium-sized vine that yields grapes when harvested - an essential ingredient in the production of wine that also tastes nice when eaten raw. Takes a long time to initially grow but can be harvested repeatedly in a single lifespan.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Plant_Grape.label: grape plant
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arbalest.description: A powerful crossbow. Fires a heavy bolt over extreme distances, but takes a long time to cock it due to the need to use the cranequin.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arbalest.label: arbalest
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arbalest.tools.0.label: Glied
LanguageData.VFEM2_Arrow_Warbow.label: warbow arrow
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bolt_Arbalest.label: arbalest bolt
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bullet_Arquebus.label: arquebus grapeshot
LanguageData.VFEM2_Bullet_HandCannon.label: handcannon grapeshot
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.description: An uralt firearm with a smoothbore barrel, the arquebus delivers powerful shots at decent range. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.label: arquebus
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.tools.0.label: Aktie
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_Arquebus.tools.1.label: Fass
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.description: An uralt crude but deadly firearm, the hand cannon fires a devastating grapeshot over a short distance. The lead balls lose velocity and damage with distance, and are extremely ineffective against armor. Due to the chempowder reaction when firing the arquebus, plumes of blindsmoke are ejected from the barrel.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.label: hand cannon
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.tools.0.label: Aktie
LanguageData.VFEM2_Gun_HandCannon.tools.1.label: Fass
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.description: A single-handed axe made for throwing. Light enough to be thrown accurately at medium range, it's also a great melee weapon in the hands of a capable warrior.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.label: throwing axe
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.tools.0.label: handhaben
LanguageData.VFEM2_ThrowingAxe.tools.1.label: Klinge
LanguageData.VFEM2_Warbow.description: A powerful, long variant of the greatbow. While it doesn’t excel at hitting nearby enemies, arrows fired from the warbow curve over walls and can be fired without requiring line of sight.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Warbow.label: warbow
LanguageData.VFEM2_Warbow.tools.0.label: Glied
LanguageData.VFEM2V_ThrowingAxe_Thrown.label: thrown axe
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Heater.description: A heavy medium-sized steel shield. Offers a significant amount of protection against melee and ranged attacks.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Heater.label: heater shield
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Round.description: A wooden shield held together with a metal band. A leather strap and metal handle are also present on the back to allow for easy one-handed maneuvering during combat.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Shield_Round.label: round shield
LanguageData.VCE_ElectricHauteSection.description: An electrically-powered state-of-the-art culinary station, designed for precision cooking and artful meal presentation.
LanguageData.VCE_ElectricHauteSection.label: electric haute section
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.0.name: Tray
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.1.name: Cuttlery
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.2.name: Plate
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.3.name: Drizzle
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.4.name: Ingredient1
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.5.name: Ingredient2
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.comps.2.graphics.6.name: Ingredient3
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.description: An opulent symphony of flavor and form, where the finest ingredients and masterful technique unite in a transcendent culinary masterpiece. Provides exquisite mood when eaten, and ensures that colonists eating it together will form strong opinions of each other.
LanguageData.VCE_MealHaute.label: haute meal
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoHeavyHelmet.descriptio: A heavy, high-powered helmet complete with an embedded HUD system and diagnostics display. It's theorized that either a long-lost or far-advanced civilizations shock troopers would adorn this helmet before strike missions during the mechanoid wars. The helmet itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoHeavyHelmet.label: heavy crypto helmet
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoLightHelmet.descriptio: A lower-powered helmet with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth hood. It's theorized that either a long-lost or far-advanced civilizations scout troopers would adorn this helmet before recon missions during the mechanoid wars. The helmet itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoLightHelmet.label: crypto helmet
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoArmor.description: Low-powered plasteel carapace armor draped with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth sash affixed over one shoulder, the armor emits a low electrical hum and feels smooth to the touch. The power supply itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow one's bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoArmor.label: crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoHeavyArmor.description: Heavy, high-powered plasteel plate armor affixed with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth cowl, the armor emits a low electrical hum and feels smooth to the touch. The power supply itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoHeavyArmor.label: heavy crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoArmor.description: An unfinished piece of metal armor.
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoArmor.label: unfinished crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenEmptyCryptosleepPod.descriptio: An alt cryptosleep pod that has been opened. Whatever was inside is long gone.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenEmptyCryptosleepPod.label: empty uralt cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFadingCryptosleepPod.descripti: A heavily damaged cryptosleep pod that is barely functioning. The occupant inside is still alive but in danger.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFadingCryptosleepPod.label: fading cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFailedCryptosleepPod.descripti: A cryptosleep pod that suffered a critical failure. The occupant inside is long dead and most likely turned into dust.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFailedCryptosleepPod.label: failed cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShipLandingBeacon.description: A rusted ship landing beacon, still flickering with an uralt, failing signal. No ship will ever respond.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShipLandingBeacon.label: uralt ship landing beacon
LanguageData.VQE_AncientTransmitterBeacon.description: A long-dead transmission beacon. Any components of value have long been removed.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientTransmitterBeacon.label: acient transmitter beacon
LanguageData.VQE_BustedShieldedTurret.description: An alt, busted turret equipped with its own ballistic shield capable of deflecting some shots. Now, it’s little more than scrap metal.
LanguageData.VQE_BustedShieldedTurret.label: busted shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_BustedSpacerAutocannon.description: An uralt autocannon designed for ship-to-ship combat. Its barrel is shattered, and its targeting systems are fried.
LanguageData.VQE_BustedSpacerAutocannon.label: busted spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminal.description: Ein uralt Computerterminal. Es ist vom Strom getrennt oder funktioniert einfach nicht.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminal.label: uralt-Terminal
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminalBank.descriptio: An uralt set of computer terminals. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoAncientTerminalBank.label: uralt terminal bank
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitor.description: A salt, frost-covered energy capacitor. It no longer halts any residual charge.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitor.label: frozen capacitor
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitorLarge.description: A large, frost-covered energy capacitor. It no longer halts any residual charge.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCapacitorLarge.label: large frozen capacitor
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptoRailcannon.description: A cutting-edge railcannon encased in ice. It has been salvaged beyond usefulness.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptoRailcannon.label: frozen crypto railcannon
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFuelTank.description: A frozen-over fuel tank, potentially filled with cryptofuel back in the day, now cracked and empty.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenFuelTank.label: frozen fuel tank
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLifeSupport.description: A collapsed life support module, its systems dead and displays shattered. No air will flow through it again.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLifeSupport.label: frozen life support
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMachinery.description: A tangle of uralt machinery, too damaged by frost and impact to be of any use.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMachinery.label: frozen machinery
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMechanoidShell.description: A frozen shell from a smashed mechanoid. It has been frozen for generations and the useful components have disintegrated.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMechanoidShell.label: frozen mechanoid shell
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMinefieldSign.description: A half-buried warning sign, encased in ice. It reads: "DANGER - ACTIVE MINEFIELD," but no mines can be seen.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenMinefieldSign.label: frozen minefield sign
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipConsole.description: A standard ship control console, now frozen and non-functional.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipConsole.label: frozen ship console
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSkyripper.description: A high-altitude fighter jet, frozen and rusted beyond repair. Whatever battles it once fought are long forgotten.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSkyripper.label: frozen skyripper
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSmallShipConsole.description: A compact ship control panel, now frozen and non-functional.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenSmallShipConsole.label: frozen sEinkaufszentrum ship console
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenThrusters.description: A set of sEinkaufszentrumer ship thrusters, now frozen solid and useless.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenThrusters.label: frozen thrusters
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoBay.description: A torpedo storage bay, frozen shut. Its launch systems are irreparably damaged.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoBay.label: frozen torpedo bay
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoCrate.description: A sealed crate containing volatile torpedoes. A single shot could turn it into a catastrophic explosion.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoCrate.label: frozen torpedo crate
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoLauncher.description: A large torpedo launcher, its firing mechanisms locked under a thick layer of ice.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenTorpedoLauncher.label: frozen torpedo launcher
LanguageData.VQE_LargeFrozenThrusters.description: A colossal set of frozen thrusters from the cryptoforge ship. They will never fire again.
LanguageData.VQE_LargeFrozenThrusters.label: large frozen thrusters
LanguageData.VQE_RuinedHospitalBed.description: A rusted-out bedframe, with a decently intact bedsheet. It offers little comfort.
LanguageData.VQE_RuinedHospitalBed.label: rusted uralt bed
LanguageData.VQE_SpentCryptofusionCoil.description: A depleted cryptofuel coil. Completely spent, it’s just another useless relic.
LanguageData.VQE_SpentCryptofusionCoil.label: spent cryptofusion coil
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenHive.description: A hive of giant insects, twisted by exposure to the crypto particles. If activated, it will spawn additional insects and hives over time, as well as valuable insect jelly.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenHive.label: frozen hive
LanguageData.VQE_BlueprintsBench.description: An alt bench covered in pristine blueprints. Studying them could provide a rare burst of crafting inspiration.
LanguageData.VQE_BlueprintsBench.label: uralt blueprints bench
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyBlueprintsBench.description: A pile of faded and illegible blueprints. Whatever knowledge they once held has long since faded away.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyBlueprintsBench.label: useless blueprints bench
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate.description: An empty crate, rusted and frozen solid. Its contents are long gone.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate.label: empty frozen crate
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate_Small.description: A frost-covered box that once contained something valuable. Now, it’s just junk.
LanguageData.VQE_EmptyFrozenCrate_Small.label: frozen box
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfMedicine.description: A frozen crate containing medical supplies. The subzero temperatures have kept them well-preserved.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfMedicine.label: frozen crate of medicine
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfRations.description: A supply crate filled with survival rations, flash-frozen in the wreckage. The food inside should still be edible.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCrateOfRations.label: frozen crate of rations
LanguageData.VQE_GoldPile.description: A scattered pile of alt galt coins, each stamped with cryptic serial codes. Their value is entirely theoretical - until someone decides otherwise.
LanguageData.VQE_GoldPile.label: galt pile
LanguageData.VQE_HugeTwistedMetal.description: A huge mangled piece of metal, twisted from the sheer force of the cryptoforge spaceship crash. Some steel can still be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_HugeTwistedMetal.label: huge twisted metal
LanguageData.VQE_LargeTwistedMetal.description: A large mangled piece of metal, twisted from the sheer force of the cryptoforge spaceship crash. Some steel can still be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_LargeTwistedMetal.label: large twisted metal
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedAdvancedComponents.descriptio: A pile of severely damaged high-tech components. While the original function is lost, some usable advanced components can still be extracted.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedAdvancedComponents.label: twisted advanced components
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedComponents.description: A warped collection of machinery and circuits. While the original function is lost, some usable components can still be extracted.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedComponents.label: twisted components
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedMetal.description: A mangled piece of metal, twisted from the sheer force of the cryptoforge spaceship crash. Some steel can still be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedMetal.label: twisted metal
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedPlasteel.description: A crumpled sheet of plasteel, scorched and bent beyond recognition. With enough effort, some of it could be salvaged.
LanguageData.VQE_TwistedPlasteel.label: twisted plasteel
LanguageData.VQE_CryptofusionCoil.description: A sEinkaufszentrum coil that converts cryptofuel into power. Despite its age, it still operates at minimal capacity.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptofusionCoil.label: cryptofusion coil
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptogenerator.label: frozen cryptogenerator
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptogenerator_Off.descriptio: An advanced generator that once powered cryptotech devices. Now, it hums faintly with dying energy. It can be restarted to once again provide power to the various subsystems, but the permanent damage to the critical component will cause the generator to become more and more unstable, eventually detonating in a devastating cryptoexplosion.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCryptogenerator_Off.label: frozen cryptogenerator
LanguageData.VQE_AetherPressureTubes.description: A network of reinforced tubes that once regulated high-density ether coolant, allowing the cryptoforge to function at peak efficiency. The technology behind it is now lost.
LanguageData.VQE_AetherPressureTubes.label: aether pressure tubes
LanguageData.VQE_AncientCryptoforge.description: An uralt workbench designed for crafting advanced crypto-technology weapons and armor. It features intricate mechanisms and a forging process that seems to defy conventional metallurgy. The tools and technology integrated into it are beyond modern understanding, utilizing encrypted blueprints and precision-tuned nano-assembly techniques.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientCryptoforge.label: uralt cryptoforge
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoInfusionCoils.description: These coils once channeled encrypted energy pulses to refine and enhance crypto-tech materials. Without a working power source, they are just intricate, useless relics.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoInfusionCoils.label: crypto infusion coils
LanguageData.VQE_CryptotechPrototypeBench.description: A specialized workbench used to design and iterate new crypto-tech blueprints. The trial and error carefully documented in the blueprints and prototypes is bound to speed up the work done on the cryptoforge greatly.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptotechPrototypeBench.label: cryptotech prototype bench
LanguageData.VQE_SubZeroHammer.description: A massive forging hammer designed to shape materials at near absolute zero, strengthening them beyond conventional limits. Now, it’s little more than an oversized chunk of frozen scrap.
LanguageData.VQE_SubZeroHammer.label: sub-zero hammer
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox.description: A ship's black box recorder, filled with encrypted data. Given enough time, a skilled hacker may be able to extract critical information about what transpired.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox.label: uralt black box
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox_Off.description: A ship's black box recorder. Any important information has already been downloaded, and the black box is nothing but junk.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientBlackBox_Off.label: disabled uralt black box
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay.description: A long-range scanning relay with some alt alerts about an important event. If one was to initiate a scan, the location of a ship crash will be revealed. Initiating the scan will generate a strong enough power signature to attract a mechanoid hive.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay.label: frozen scanning relay
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay_Off.description: A long-range scanning relay. Any notifications and data has been removed, and it’s nothing but a big hunk of junk.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScanningRelay_Off.label: disabled frozen scanning relay
LanguageData.VQE_AncientWargamingTable.description: An uralt, slightly rusted, sturdy table designed for strategic miniature wargames, featuring a spacious surface for terrain, armies, and battle plans. The diplomacy required by the rules trains social skill.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientWargamingTable.label: uralt wargaming table
LanguageData.VQE_AncientLandmine.description: An verborgen, high-explosive payload connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is verborgen in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. It’s impossible to detect it until triggered.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientLandmine.label: uralt landmine
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret.description: A portable automatic turret with a ballistic shield in front of it. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire. The ballistic shield is capable of deflecting some shots.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret.label: uralt shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Bullet.label: mini-turret bullet
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Gun.descriptio: Eine einfache automatische Waffe zur Montage auf einem Turm.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Gun.label: uralt shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon.description: An uralt autocannon designed for ship-to-ship combat. It still appears to be functional. Its large-caliber shells do heavy damage over significant ranges.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon.label: uralt spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon_Bullet.label: uralt spacer autocannon shell
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon_Gun.label: uralt spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCentipede.description: A frozen shell containing a centipede.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCentipede.label: frozen centipede
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLancer.description: A frozen shell containing a lancer.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLancer.label: frozen lancer
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScyther.description: A frozen shell containing a scyther.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years.
