Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScyther.label: frozen scyther
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock.label: uralt airlock
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock_Large.description: A large, heavily reinforced airlock door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock_Large.label: uralt large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. It has been forced open and cannot be closed again.
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock.label: forced uralt airlock
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock_Large.descripti: A heavily reinforced large airlock door. It has been forced open and cannot be closed again.
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock_Large.label: forced uralt large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_FragileFrozenShipHull.description: An impassable ship hull wall. The cracks and damage from the crash allow it to be destroyed. Capable of halting up a roof.
LanguageData.VQE_FragileFrozenShipHull.label: fragile frozen ship hull
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipHull.description: An impassable, indestructible ship hull wall. Capable of halting up a roof.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipHull.label: frozen ship hull
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock.label: stuck uralt airlock
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.comps.0.j: Force this uralt large airlock open
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.descripti: A large, heavily reinforced airlock door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.label: stuck uralt large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_AncientFloorHeater.description: A large, outdated floor heater. If power is restored, it might still provide warmth.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientFloorHeater.label: uralt floor heater
LanguageData.VQE_SmallFlashfreezer.description: A floor-mounted vent that continuously releases near-absolute-zero air. It could freeze anything given enough time.
LanguageData.VQE_SmallFlashfreezer.label: sEinkaufszentrum flashfreezer
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.description: A medium-sized bioengineered insectoid adapted for extreme calt. In frigid temperatures, razor-sharp blades emerge from its limbs, turning it into a swift and deadly predator. However, when exposed to warmth, the blades retract, and the creature becomes sluggish, its movements slow and cumbersome. Highly alt in icy environments but far less threatening when overheated.
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.label: ice crawler
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.tools.0.label: head claw
LanguageData.VQE_IceCrawler.tools.1.label: Kopf
LanguageData.VQE_Megamidge.description: Not actually a midge, the megamidge is a genetically-engineered giant insectoid adapted for extreme calt. In freezing temperatures, deadly cryogenic blades extend from its limbs, allowing it to deliver devastating slashes that inflict deep wounds and crippling crypto slowdown. However, when exposed to warmth, its blades retract, and it becomes sluggish and far less alt. Agile and lethal in the calt, but vulnerable in heat.
LanguageData.VQE_Megamidge.label: megamidge
LanguageData.VQE_Megamidge.tools.0.label: Kopf
LanguageData.VQE_Cryptofreeze.label: cryptofreeze
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoSpark.label: cryptospark
LanguageData.VQE_Bullet_Cryptobolter.label: cryptobolter shot
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.description: A heavy, high-tech axe with a cryogenic-coated edge that delivers crushing strikes. On impact, it inflicts deep frostburns, flash-freezing flesh and lacing wounds with cryptofreeze, slowing movement and dealing substantial hypothermic damage over time.
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.label: cryptoaxe
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.tools.0.label: handhaben
LanguageData.VQE_MeleeWeapon_Cryptoaxe.tools.1.label: Rand
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoWeapon.label: unfinished crypto weapon
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.description: A high-tech crossbow rifle that fires cryogenic-coated bolts with devastating impact. On penetration, the bolts inflict deep frostburns, flash-freezing flesh and lacing wounds with cryptofreeze, drastically slowing movement and causing severe hypothermic damage over time.
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.label: cryptobolter
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.tools.0.label: Aktie
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.tools.1.label: Fass
LanguageData.VQE_Weapon_Cryptobolter.tools.2.label: Fass
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_Autopistol_Ancient.description: A battered, iron-framed sidearm from a long-forgotten army. Though its slide rattles and the finish is gone, it still fires reliably. Low stopping power and short range, but quick on the draw. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_Autopistol_Ancient.label: uralt autopistol
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.description: An aging belt-fed light machine gun, covered in grime and stamped with the markings of a bygone military. Its recoil is harsh, and its accuracy poor, but the sheer volume of fire can pin down or shred groups of enemies when it halts together long enough to do so. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.label: uralt LMG
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.tools.0.label: Aktie
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_LMG_Ancient.tools.1.label: Fass
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_MachinePistol_Ancient.descripti: A relic of early automatic handgun design, once issued to infantry officers. Its crude construction and worn parts limit accuracy, but its compact size and high fire rate give it surprising lethality in close quarters. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_MachinePistol_Ancient.label: uralt machine pistol
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_PumpShotgun_Ancient.description: A heavy, rust-pitted combat shotgun built for trench warfare. Fires a brutal spread of pellets at short range. Though cumbersome and slow to cycle, it remains deadly in confined spaces. Due to severe deterioration, this weapon can only fire a limited number of shots before breaking beyond repair.
LanguageData.VQED_Gun_PumpShotgun_Ancient.label: uralt shotgun
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsCap.description: A distinguished peaked cap with a stiff brim, adorned with embroidered insignia and a gilded band. While it offers little physical protection, its commanding design enhances the wearer's presence, greatly improving negotiation ability.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsCap.label: general’s cap
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsInsignia.descriptio: Decorative galten epaulettes adorned with braided aiguillette cord and a polished ceremonial clasp. Once worn by high-ranking officers, these insignia instill a sense of duty and composure, making the wearer less prone to mental breaks.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsInsignia.label: general's insignia
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_MilitaryCoat.description: A heavy military coat designed for harsh conditions, offering protection from calt, wind, and debris on the battlefield. Makes the wearer more confident. Since the coat has been mass-produced, individual items do not vary in quality at all.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_MilitaryCoat.label: military coat
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloDoor.description: A heavily reinforced door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloDoor.label: uralt silo door
LanguageData.VQED_LockedSiloHatch.description: A sealed entrance to the deeper facility. Still structurally sound, but heavily pressurized. Can be forced open to allow access.
LanguageData.VQED_LockedSiloHatch.label: locked silo hatch
LanguageData.VQED_SiloExitStaircase.description: A vertical return route to the surface. Rarely used, but still passable.
LanguageData.VQED_SiloExitStaircase.label: silo exit staircase
LanguageData.VQED_SiloStaircase.description: A reinforced accessway to the lower levels. Coated in dust and stale air.
LanguageData.VQED_SiloStaircase.label: silo staircase
LanguageData.VQED_StuckAncientSiloDoor.comps.0.jobStr: Force this uralt silo door open
LanguageData.VQED_StuckAncientSiloDoor.description: A heavily reinforced door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQED_StuckAncientSiloDoor.label: stuck uralt silo door
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPassiveLamp.description: A passive illumination device. Emits a faint glow thanks to decaying long-life cells.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPassiveLamp.label: uralt passive lamp
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloFloodlight.description: A high-output floodlight installed for emergency lighting. Dims rapidly without reliable power.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloFloodlight.label: uralt silo floodlight
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloLamp.description: A hard-wired light source installed in the facility. Still capable of emitting weak light.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloLamp.label: uralt silo lamp
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientWeaponBox.description: A long, rotting wooden box that usually stores weapons. This one is empty.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientWeaponBox.label: opened weapon box
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryCrate.description: An empty, rusted military crate. Its contents are long gone.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryCrate.label: empty military crate
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryPallet.description: An empty military pallet. If it held anything of value, it’s gone now.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyMilitaryPallet.label: empty military pallet
LanguageData.VQED_EmptySmallMilitaryCrate.description: A sEinkaufszentrum, rusted and empty military box. Anything of value is gone.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptySmallMilitaryCrate.label: empty military box
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfBioferrite.descripti: A rusted military crate, packed to the brim with bioferrite, extracted from some mysterious source by the uralt military.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfBioferrite.label: military crate of bioferrite
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfDeadlifeShells.descr: A rusted military crate with deadlife shells. These artillery shells are packed with a dust-like substance that, after exploding into a cloud, will settle on nearby human and animal corpses and raise them as shamblers. Many of those shells have lost their potency, but some may still work.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfDeadlifeShells.label: military crate of deadlife shells
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfGold.description: A rusted, military crate containing galt. The fact that the silo has been sealed for generations prevented it from being stolen.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfGold.label: military crate of galt
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfHemogen.description: A rusted military crate containing some alt hemogen packs, mostly expired. With the right mindset, it’s possible to extract some hemogen packs from it.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfHemogen.label: military crate of hemogen
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfMedicine.description: A rusted military crate containing advanced glitterworld medicine. While some of it may no longer be usable, it’s possible to recover a few intact boxes from the crate.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfMedicine.label: military crate of medicine
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfSilver.description: A rusted, military crate containing silver. The fact that the silo has been sealed for generations prevented it from being stolen.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfSilver.label: military crate of silver
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfAdvancedCarParts.de: Precision vehicle parts, packed with extreme care. These components were never meant to be used lightly.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfAdvancedCarParts.la: military pallet of advanced car parts
A rare cache of precision-engineered components, carefully preserved for use in high-tech systems. Remarkably intact.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfApparel.description: A crate of alt military coats. Despite torn fabric and weird smell, they seem usable.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfApparel.label: military pallet of apparel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBasicCarParts.descr: A stack of labeled vehicle components, built for standard-issue transport units. Light corrosion on outer frames.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBasicCarParts.label: military pallet of basic car parts
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBooks.description: A crate of alt books, many military-issue. Pages are slightly warped but readable, filled with technical and tactical data.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfBooks.label: military pallet of books
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfChemfuel.descriptio: A heavily marked pallet of sealed chemfuel containers. The liquid inside sloshes with worrying consistency.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfChemfuel.label: military pallet of chemfuel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfComponents.descript: A reinforced pallet of industrial-grade components. Each part seems to be untouched since storage.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfComponents.label: military pallet of industrial components
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHEShells.descriptio: An ammunition pallet loaded with high-explosive artillery shells. Armed and gefährlich.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHEShells.label: military pallet of high-explosive shells
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHyperweave.descript: A high-security fabric pallet containing rolls of hyperweave. The dense weave still resists tearing or decay.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfHyperweave.label: military pallet of hyperweave
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfIncendiaryShells.de: A cache of incendiary shells packed in insulated cases. Volatile, even after years of storage.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfMedicine.descriptio: Boxes of standard-issue medical supplies, sealed against decay. Some packaging shows wear, but the contents remain viable.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfMedicine.label: military pallet of medicine
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfPlasteel.descriptio: A tightly packed pallet of dense, lightweight plasteel. Still in usable condition.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfPlasteel.label: military pallet of plasteel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfRations.description: Stacks of packaged survival meals, labeled for long-term emergency use. Still sealed, still edible. Probably.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfRations.label: military pallet of rations
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSteel.description: A storage pallet stacked with steel beams. The metal shows signs of surface oxidation but remains structurally sound.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSteel.label: military pallet of steel
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSynthread.descripti: Rolls of synthetic fiber cloth wrapped and labeled for logistics. Faint chemical odor suggests it’s been stored for decades.
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryPalletOfSynthread.label: military pallet of synthread
LanguageData.VQED_MysteriousAncientWeaponBox.descript: A long, rotting wooden box that usually stores weapons. Can be opened, but there’s no way to tell what weapon is inside.
LanguageData.VQED_MysteriousAncientWeaponBox.label: mysterious weapon crate
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateOfFlares.descript: A sEinkaufszentrum, rusted military box. It seems to contain some valuable disruptor flares.
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateOfFlares.label: military box of flares
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateWithATome.descrip: A salt, rusted military box. It seems to halt some creepy, alt knowledge in the form of a tome.
LanguageData.VQED_SmallMilitaryCrateWithATome.label: military box with an uralt tome
LanguageData.VQED_AncientBurnoutGenerator.description: A compact generator built for short-term use. Needs to be kickstarted to work, and will only operate for a limited amount of time before it shuts down. It can then be kickstarted again.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientBurnoutGenerator.label: uralt burnout generator
LanguageData.VQED_IndustrialBurnoutGenerator.descript: A large emergency generator stored deep underground. Needs to be kickstarted to work, and will only operate for a limited amount of time before it shuts down. It can then be kickstarted again.
LanguageData.VQED_IndustrialBurnoutGenerator.label: industrial burnout generator
LanguageData.VQED_AncientFuelPipeline.description: A large fuel pipeline for transporting chemfuel. Now rusted and badly damaged.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientFuelPipeline.label: uralt fuel pipeline
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHawk.description: An alt fighter jet stored for future conflict. Time and corrosion have rendered it inoperative.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHawk.label: uralt hawk
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHoldingPlatform.description: A reinforced platform meant to secure entities. The restraints are now inoperable.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientHoldingPlatform.label: alt halting platform
LanguageData.VQED_AncientLandship.description: A massive land vehicle stored for a peculiar purpose, perhaps for war. Its systems are dead and decayed.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientLandship.label: uralt landship
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryBox.description: A compact supply box once ready for emergency use. Now warped from decades of exposure.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryBox.label: uralt military box
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryCrate.description: A sealed storage crate from a military cache. The contents have degraded or fused shut.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryCrate.label: uralt Militärkiste
LanguageData.VQED_AncientOminousMachinery.description: Complex equipment stored without documentation. Dust-clogged and inert after years of dormancy.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientOminousMachinery.label: uralt ominous machinery
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSpool.description: A large industrial spool for cabling or hose. Corrosion has rendered it brittle and unusable.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSpool.label: uralt spool
LanguageData.VQED_AncientTank.description: A preserved armored vehicle. Its electronics and hydraulics have deteriorated with age.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientTank.label: uralt tank
LanguageData.VQED_BuriedDeathPit.description: An alt containment pit now completely covered in twisted metal and scrap, preventing anything that lied dormant inside from crawling out.
LanguageData.VQED_BuriedDeathPit.label: buried death pit
LanguageData.VQED_BustedMinigunTurret.description: An alt turret housing torn open by heavy impacts. The weapon system inside is shattered and inert.
LanguageData.VQED_BustedMinigunTurret.label: busted minigun turret
LanguageData.VQED_BustedVehicleElevator.description: An alt elevator platform designed to move heavy vehicles. Non-functional due to mechanical failure.
LanguageData.VQED_BustedVehicleElevator.label: busted vehicle elevator
LanguageData.VQED_DamagedTire.description: A spare tire stored too long in dry conditions. Its rubber has cracked and failed.
LanguageData.VQED_DamagedTire.label: damaged tire
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminal.description: Ein uralt Computerterminal. Es ist vom Strom getrennt oder funktioniert einfach nicht.
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminal.label: defunct terminal
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminalBank.description: An uralt set of computer terminals. It’s disconnected from power, or simply not working.
LanguageData.VQED_DefunctTerminalBank.label: defunct terminal bank
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientKennel.description: A large kennel that could halt several animals suspended in a deadlife dust-induced coma. It’s completely empty.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyAncientKennel.label: empty uralt kennel
LanguageData.VQED_LargeRottenCrate.description: A heavy-duty storage crate that has warped and splintered with time.
LanguageData.VQED_LargeRottenCrate.label: large rotten crate
LanguageData.VQED_MountainOfCasings.description: A mass of rusted ammunition debris. Abandoned after an unknown training or malfunction event.
LanguageData.VQED_MountainOfCasings.label: mountain of casings
LanguageData.VQED_OldShippingContainer.description: A heavy shipping container once locked down for safety. Hinges are fused shut from rust.
LanguageData.VQED_OldShippingContainer.label: alt shipping container
LanguageData.VQED_OpenDeadlifeCasket.description: An alt military casket that suspends a high ranking saltier using the deadlife particles. Whatever has lied inside is no longer there.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenDeadlifeCasket.label: empty deadlife casket
LanguageData.VQED_PileOfCasings.description: alt artillery casings swept into a pile. Likely remnants from storage-level live-fire testing.
LanguageData.VQED_PileOfCasings.label: pile of casings
LanguageData.VQED_RottenCrate.description: A wooden crate stored too close to moisture. It collapsed under its own weight.
LanguageData.VQED_RottenCrate.label: rotten crate
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorLeft.description: A containment structure of unknown function. Critical systems have failed from prolonged inactivity.
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorLeft.label: Ruineeed large inhibitor (left)
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorRight.description: A containment structure of unknown function. Critical systems have failed from prolonged inactivity.
LanguageData.VQED_RuinedInhibitorRight.label: Ruineeed large inhibitor (right)
LanguageData.VQED_RustedAncientCot.description: A rusted-out military cot. It offers little comfort.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedAncientCot.label: rusted uralt cot
LanguageData.VQED_RustedBarrel.description: A sealed industrial barrel. Its contents long dried or evaporated.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedBarrel.label: rusted barrel
LanguageData.VQED_RustedImmobilizer.description: A vertical restraint frame with metal straps and dark stains. Whatever was held here didn’t leave willingly.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedImmobilizer.label: rusted immobilizer
LanguageData.VQED_RustedStepladder.description: A maintenance ladder placed here long ago. Metal fatigue has made it unsafe to use.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedStepladder.label: rusted stepladder
LanguageData.VQED_RustedToolbox.description: A heavy toolbox kept in reserve. The tools inside have fused with rust and dust.
LanguageData.VQED_RustedToolbox.label: rusted toolbox
LanguageData.VQED_TirePallet.description: An organized set of spare tires. Time has made them brittle and unsafe.
LanguageData.VQED_TirePallet.label: tire pallet
LanguageData.VQED_UnwrappedAncientTank.description: A preserved armored vehicle. Its electronics and hydraulics have deteriorated with age.
LanguageData.VQED_UnwrappedAncientTank.label: uralt tank
LanguageData.VQED_UselessScripPallet.description: A rotting pallet stacked with damp paper slips. Possibly currency, though their purpose is lost to time.
LanguageData.VQED_UselessScripPallet.label: useless scrip pallet
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveTerminal.description: An uralt computer terminal. It seems to still be connected to power, with some cryptic defensive protocols ready to be activated by a person in charge.
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveTerminal.label: active terminal
LanguageData.VQED_AncientDesk.description: An alt military desk. Nothing useful remains on it.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientDesk.label: uralt desk
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKennel.description: A large kennel that could halt several animals suspended in a deadlife dust-induced coma. Seems secure enough, for now.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKennel.label: uralt kennel
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPlanningDesk.description: An alt military desk containing battle maps and plans. Studying it may reveal the location of another alt silo.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPlanningDesk.label: uralt planning desk
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedChute.description: A closed chute with an unknown purpose.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedChute.label: closed chute
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedDeadlifeCasket.description: An alt military casket that suspends a high ranking saltier using the deadlife particles.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedDeadlifeCasket.label: closed deadlife casket
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedRotstinkVent.description: A large vent connected to some revolting storage of biomass. It seems to be shut off for now.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_ClosedRotstinkVent.label: closed rotstink vent
LanguageData.VQED_DormantMilitaryTurret.description: A dormant automatic turret. Belt-fed ammunition ensures it can fire continuously for long periods of time, but its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, which makes friendly fire likely. It seems to be inactive, for now.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_DormantMilitaryTurret.label: dormant military turret
LanguageData.VQED_EerieSarcophagus.description: A sealed black casket. It shows signs of internal pressure, but no visible access points.
LanguageData.VQED_EerieSarcophagus.label: eerie sarcophagus
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyEerieSarcophagus.label: empty eerie sarcophagus
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyICBMSilo.description: A missile cradle with no payload. Maintenance ports are sealed and fused.
LanguageData.VQED_EmptyICBMSilo.label: empty ICBM silo
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMLaunchTerminal.description: An uralt set of computer terminals. The displays contain information about the preparation to launch a series of ICBMs containing deadlife payloads. Once the launch sequence is initiated, it cannot be stopped. It seems only the person in charge of the complex can initiate the launch.
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMLaunchTerminal.label: ICBM launch terminal
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMSiloLid.description: A solid lid designed to protect an armed warhead. The release system has seized.
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMSiloLid.label: ICBM silo lid
LanguageData.VQED_InactiveDeadlifeVent.description: A free standing vent connected to an underground deadlife particle distribution system. If it reactivates, it will quickly flood the area with deadlife dust.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_InactiveDeadlifeVent.label: inactive deadlife vent
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkObelisk.description: A massive, jagged obelisk with no markings or visible seams. Its surface absorbs light unnaturally, and proximity induces headaches and unease. Though inert for now, occasional vibrations suggest it may not remain dormant forever.
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkObelisk.label: inert dark obelisk
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkPillar.description: A towering black pillar of unknown alloy. Though it appears inactive, it hums faintly with a deep, almost imperceptible resonance. The surrounding air feels heavier near it, and equipment readings often fail without reason. No obvious function can be determined, but its presence is deeply unsettling.
LanguageData.VQED_InertDarkPillar.label: inert dark pillar
LanguageData.VQED_InertDeathDoorway.description: A shadowed, monolithic doorway sealed into the structure itself. From within, thin streams of deadlife dust drift outward, defying airflow. No hinges, no mechanisms, only the sensation that something waits on the other side.
LanguageData.VQED_InertDeathDoorway.label: inert death doorway
LanguageData.VQED_LoadedICBMSilo.description: A still-intact missile lies inside this silo. No signs of activation or maintenance in decades.
LanguageData.VQED_LoadedICBMSilo.label: loaded ICBM silo
LanguageData.VQED_LockedICBMSilo.description: A silo hatch that never received a launch signal. The mechanism has since locked tight.
LanguageData.VQED_LockedICBMSilo.label: locked ICBM silo
LanguageData.VQED_SealedDeathPit.description: A sealed containment pit lined with uralt restraints. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep from the cracks, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free. Heavy blast doors prevent the darkness from reaching out, but the mechanism seems well maintained.\n\nThe General can activate this trap from one of the terminals in the command room.
LanguageData.VQED_SealedDeathPit.label: sealed death pit
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoProjector.description: An alt projector unit positioned for use with a matching screen. Works when powered, but only if pointed at the kino screen.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoProjector.label: uralt kino projector
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoScreen.description: A massive, alt-world display once used for communal viewing. Grainy visuals flicker to life only when paired with a functioning kino projector. Still strangely captivating despite the static and distortion.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientKinoScreen.label: uralt kino screen
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveDeadlifeVent.description: A free standing vent connected to an underground deadlife particle distribution system. An endless supply of deadlife dust pours from the outflow.
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveDeadlifeVent.label: deadlife vent
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret.description: An automatic turret. Belt-fed ammunition ensures it can fire continuously for long periods of time, but its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, which makes friendly fire likely.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret.label: uralt military turret
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Bullet.label: mini-turret bullet
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Gun.descripti: Eine einfache automatische Waffe zur Montage auf einem Turm.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Gun.label: uralt military turret
LanguageData.VQED_DeadlifeNode.description: A volatile node buried in the facility. Proximity or movement causes instability and discharge of deadlife particles.
LanguageData.VQED_DeadlifeNode.label: deadlife node
LanguageData.VQED_DeathHole.description: A sEinkaufszentrum containment hole where failed experiments were thrown, with the intention to later on be buried in concrete. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep out, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free.
LanguageData.VQED_DeathHole.label: death hole
LanguageData.VQED_DeathPit.description: A sealed containment pit lined with uralt restraints. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep from the cracks, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free.
LanguageData.VQED_DeathPit.label: death pit
LanguageData.VQED_OpenChute.description: An open chute with an unknown purpose. Some eerie sounds can be heard down below, but nobody knows how deep it goes.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenChute.label: chute
LanguageData.VQED_OpenRotstinkVent.description: A large vent connected to some revolting storage of biomass. Ejects huge amounts of rotstink gas.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenRotstinkVent.label: rotstink vent
LanguageData.VQE_DisruptorFlare.description: Plastic tubes filled with bioferrite. On impact, the flare burns, creating a bright flash and a local psychic disruption. This stuns psychically sensitive creatures, revealing those that are invisible, and reducing their consciousness and movement speed for a short while. Afterwards, the flare continues to burn, lighting up a wide area for some time.
LanguageData.VQE_DisruptorFlare.label: disruptor flare
LanguageData.VQE_DisruptorFlare.verbs.0.label: throw disruptor flare
LanguageData.VQED_DistantICBMExplosion.label: Distant ICBM Explosion
LanguageData.VQED_ICBMSkyfaller.label: Deadlife ICBM
LanguageData.CashRegister_CashRegister.label: cash register
LanguageData.CashRegister_CashRegister.description: A cash register. Workplace for your waiters. From here you can control your restaurant.
LanguageData.Frame_CashRegister_CashRegister.label: cash register (blueprint)
LanguageData.Frame_CashRegister_CashRegister.descript: a cash register. workplace for your waiters. from here you can control your restaurant.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_DiningSpot.label: dining spot
LanguageData.TherapyCouch.label: therapy couch
LanguageData.TherapyCouch.description: A partially upholstered kind of bench, comfy enough to relax but not to fall asleep.
LanguageData.Blueprint_TherapyCouch.label: therapy couch (blueprint)
LanguageData.Frame_TherapyCouch.label: therapy couch (under construction)
LanguageData.Frame_TherapyCouch.description: A partially upholstered kind of bench, comfy enough to relax but not to fall asleep.
LanguageData.Mech_Waiter.description: A sEinkaufszentrum mechanoid designed for waiting and hauling. It is slow. Lacking a ranged weapon, it can make only weak melee attacks.
LanguageData.Mech_Waiter.label: waiter
LanguageData.CashRegister_Mech.description: A spot for mechanoid waiters. From here you can control your restaurant.
LanguageData.CashRegister_Mech.label: Autonomous Cash Register
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_OxygenPack.description: A utility pack containing a large supply of compressed oxygen. When worn with vacuum-sealed apparel, it provides full immunity to vacuum by supplying breathable air. The pack only consumes oxygen while in vacuum and must be periodically reloaded. It also dramatically reduces exposure to pollution through the lungs.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_OxygenPack.label: oxygen pack
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige.description: Ein Schutzanzug, der den Benutzer im Vakuum des Weltraums schützt. Der Anzug schränkt die Bewegungsfreiheit des Trägers ein und reduziert seine Bewegungsgeschwindigkeit erheblich.\n\nTeure und schöne Prestige-Vakuumanzüge wie dieser werden normalerweise für Personen mit hohem Status in der königlichen Marine hergestellt. Eingebettete Eltex-Fäden steigern zudem die psychische Sensibilität des Trägers.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige.label: Prestige-Vakuumanzug
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_VacsuitHelmet_Prestige.descr: Ein Helm, der den Sauerstoff des Benutzers effizient recycelt und es ihm ermöglicht, stundenlang im Vakuum des Weltraums zu atmen. Der Prozess ist nicht vollkommen effizient, daher muss der Benutzer regelmäßig in eine unter Druck stehende Umgebung zurückkehren.\n\nEin teurer und schöner, prestigeträchtiger Vakuumanzughelm wie dieser wird normalerweise für Personen mit hohem Status in der königlichen Marine hergestellt. Eingebettete Eltex-Fäden steigern zudem die psychische Sensibilität des Trägers.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_VacsuitHelmet_Prestige.label: Prestige-Vacsuit-Helm
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelDrain.description: Eine trichterartige Lagerstruktur, die dazu dient, Astrotreibstoff in das Netzwerk einzuspeisen und angeschlossene Tanks aufzufüllen.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelDrain.label: Abfluss von Astrotreibstoff
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.description: Erzeugt Strom durch den Verbrauch von Astrokraftstoff. Viel effizienter als Chem-Fuel-Generatoren.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.label: Astrotreibstoffgenerator
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelPipe.description: A large pipe for transporting high-grade astrofuel around. Unlike other pipes, it’s big, bulky, acts as cover and can’t be stood on. Astrofuel pipes can’t be placed on workbench interaction spots and in doorways.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelPipe.label: Astrotreibstoffrohr
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.description: Eine spezialisierte Struktur, die Chemtreibstoff zu hochwertigem Astrotreibstoff veredelt. Für den Betrieb muss es an das Astrokraftstoff-Rohrnetz angeschlossen und mit mindestens einem Astrokraftstofftank verbunden sein. Sobald die Verbindung hergestellt ist, wandelt es den eingesetzten Chemietreibstoff automatisch in Astrotreibstoff zur Verwendung in Motoren und Systemen um.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.label: Astrotreibstoff-Synthesizer
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelTap.description: Ein trichterartiges Speichergerät, das dazu gedacht war, Astrotreibstoff zur späteren Verwendung abzugeben.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelTap.label: Astrokraftstoffhahn
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelValve.description: Switches astrofuel flow on and off.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelValve.label: astrofuel valve
LanguageData.VGE_Astropurifier.description: Eine Gravtech-Einheit, die die Präzision und Stabilität der Astrotreibstoffveredelung verbessert. Wenn es neben einem Astrotreibstoff-Synthesizer platziert wird, ermöglicht es eine perfekte 1:1-Umwandlung von Chemietreibstoff in Astrotreibstoff, obwohl der Prozess doppelt so lange dauert.
LanguageData.VGE_Astropurifier.label: Astroreiniger
LanguageData.VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.description: A monumental astrofuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship.
LanguageData.VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.label: riesiger Astrotreibstofftank
LanguageData.VGE_GiantThruster.description:
Ein massives, verstärktes Astrotreibstoff-Triebwerk aus fortschrittlichen Legierungen und einer ultradichten Vacstone-Beschichtung. Es erhöht die Reichweite und maximale Größe des Gravschiffs massiv. Triebwerke benötigen einen freien Bereich ohne große Gebäude und Gravschiff-Unterkonstruktionen.

Erfordert Vakuumsteinblöcke, die von orbitalen Asteroiden erhalten werden können.

Ein Gravschiff kann bis zu vier riesige Triebwerke unterstützen.
LanguageData.VGE_GiantThruster.label: riesiges Triebwerk
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenAstrofuelPipe.description: A verborgen, reinforced tube for transporting high-grade astrofuel around. While it’s not visible, it is much more expensive to construct.
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenAstrofuelPipe.label: verborgen astrofuel pipe
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialAstrofuelGenerator.descrip: Erzeugt eine große Menge Strom durch den Verbrauch von Astrokraftstoff. Viel effizienter als Chem-Fuel-Generatoren.
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialAstrofuelGenerator.label: Industrieller Astrokraftstoffgenerator
LanguageData.VGE_Agrocell.description: An enclosed, space-efficient growing unit designed for use on gravships. Built into the floor for unobstructed movement, it features integrated sunlamps and a nutrient system that must remain powered, as plants will die if power is cut.
LanguageData.VGE_Agrocell.label: Agrozelle
LanguageData.VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.description: A sEinkaufszentrum-sized box containing large uranium shells. Used by different gauss artillery turrets to reload. A box is fed directly into an adjacent gravship artillery when it needs to be reloaded.
LanguageData.VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.label: Gauß-Munitionskiste
LanguageData.VGE_AnticraftCaster.description: A medium gravship-mounted energy weapon that fires short, razor-sharp bursts of cutting beam with surgical precision. Built to punch holes through critical systems, the caster trades sustained suppression for rapid, accurate strikes. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. Uses a lot of power to fire.
LanguageData.VGE_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster beam
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_GaussGun.label: Gauss gun shot
LanguageData.VGE_GaussGun.description: A sEinkaufszentrum, single-barrel electromagnetic cannon that launches dense uranium slugs at extreme velocities. Designed for both local bombardments and medium-range engagements, it can also target other gravships in orbit. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GaussGun.label: gauss gun
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_GaussGun.label: gauss gun
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_JavelinPod.label: javelin pod
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_PointDefense.label: Punktverteidigungswaffe
LanguageData.VGE_JavelinPod.description: A compact multi-tube missile platform that launches a volley of six guided astrofuel javelins. Meant for fast, hard-hitting strikes against exposed gravships and unarmored surface forces. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_JavelinPod.label: javelin pod
LanguageData.VGE_PointDefenseTurret.description: A specialized defensive turret built exclusively for gravships. It intercepts explosive projectiles and incoming drop pods within its protective radius, but cannot engage ground targets. Interception chance scales with the target’s velocity.
LanguageData.VGE_PointDefenseTurret.label: point defense turret
LanguageData.VGE_Rocket_JavelinRocket.label: Javelin rocket
LanguageData.VGE_TargetingTerminal.description: A control station dedicated to operating a single gravship artillery piece. Requires a crew member to manually aim and fire the weapon. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_TargetingTerminal.label: Zielterminal
LanguageData.VGE_CompactGeneBank.description: A miniaturized version of the gene bank, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. It stores genepacks and makes them usable for creating new xenogerms when placed near a gene assembler. It draws power directly from the grav engine and prevents genepacks from deteriorating while slowly repairing deterioration.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactGeneBank.label: kompakte Genbank
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBasicRecharger.description: Eine miniaturisierte Version des Mech-Ladegeräts, die so konzipiert ist, dass sie in die engen Räume eines Gravschiffs passt. Leichte Mechanoiden können sich hier aufladen. Beim Aufladen erzeugt dieses Ladegerät giftige Abfallpakete und speichert diese intern. Spediteure müssen die Müllbeutel von Zeit zu Zeit entfernen. Der Großteil der Energie wird direkt vom Gravitationsmotor bezogen.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBasicRecharger.label: Kompaktes Mech-Ladegerät
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStandardRecharger.descriptio: Eine miniaturisierte Version des großen Mech-Ladegeräts, das in die engen Räume eines Gravschiffs passt. Hier können mittlere, schwere und ultraschwere Mechanoiden aufgeladen werden. Beim Aufladen erzeugt dieses Ladegerät giftige Abfallpakete und speichert diese intern. Spediteure müssen die Müllbeutel von Zeit zu Zeit entfernen. Der Großteil der Energie wird direkt vom Gravitationsmotor bezogen.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStandardRecharger.label: Kompaktes großes Mech-Ladegerät
LanguageData.VGE_OperatorSubpersonaCore.description: Ein hochwertiger Subcore, der auf den Gravship-Kampf spezialisiert ist. Es kann sich mit einem einzelnen Gravschiff-Artilleriegeschütz verbinden und es auf die gleiche Weise steuern, wie es ein Besatzungsmitglied kann, das ein Zielterminal bedient. Seine Kampffähigkeiten sind unterdurchschnittlich, aber es ermöglicht autonome Artilleriebatterien, ohne dass menschliche Bediener erforderlich sind.
LanguageData.VGE_OperatorSubpersonaCore.label: Operator-Subpersona-Kern
LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered drug lab designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it’s equipped with containers, heaters, and measurement devices for producing various drugs. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.label: kompaktes Arzneimittellabor
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered fabrication bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it’s equipped with advanced tools for producing technological marvels from simpler materials. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.label: Kompakte Fertigungsbank
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered machining table designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it’s ideal for assembling machinery like guns and ammunition, or breaking down dead mechanoids. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.label: kompakter Bearbeitungstisch
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered biofuel refinery designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it refines biological matter like wood or plant matter into chemfuel. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.label: kompakte Biokraftstoffraffinerie
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered smithy designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it can be used to smith non-mechanical weapons and tools, as well as extract usable metal from slag chunks. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.label: kompakte Schmiede
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered stove designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, it contains a high-efficiency cooktop and integrated prep surface, as well as a butchering slate. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.label: kompakter Herd
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered tailor bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its sEinkaufszentrumer frame, this workbench comes with a sewing machine for rapid tailoring of clothes. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.label: kompakte Schneiderbank
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.description: A wall-mounted version of a tool cabinet. Increases work speed when placed near a workbench. One workbench can use up to two tool cabinets.
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.label: wall tool cabinet
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedGravExtender.description: This device once expanded a gravship’s build area, but it is now shattered. Some valuable parts can still be reclaimed.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedGravExtender.label: Zerstörter Gravfeld-Extender
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedLargeThruster.description: This powerful thruster once pushed gravships across space, but now it lies broken. Even alted, it halts some useful salvage.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedLargeThruster.label: zerstörtes großes Triebwerk
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.descrip: This tank once stored astrofuel for thrusters, but it has been destroyed. Its frame still halts recoverable materials.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.label: zerstörter sEinkaufszentrum Astrotreibstofftank
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.description: This heatsink once cooled the gravship’s systems, but it has burned out. Some steel can still be recovered from the wreck.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.label: sEinkaufszentrum Kühlkörper zerstört
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.descriptio: This tank once supplied oxygen to the gravship, but it’s now broken and useless. Some steel can still be salvaged from it.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.label: sEinkaufszentrum Sauerstofftank zerstört
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallThruster.description: This thruster once powered the gravship, but it is now wrecked beyond use. Scraps of metal and components can still be taken.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallThruster.label: sEinkaufszentrum Triebwerk zerstört
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedEscapePod.description: A crashlanded, damaged escape pod. Can be hacked open to reveal what's inside.
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedEscapePod.label: damaged escape pod
LanguageData.VGE_EscapePodSkyfaller.label: escape pod (incoming)
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.description:
The gravhulk is a colossal class of gravship, engineered to transport entire megacolonies, orbital platforms, or mobile city-cores across the skies of a planet. The grav engine generates lift by inverting and intensifying the effect of gravity in a field around itself. This engine can lift upwards, but does not produce forward thrust. It can't function far from a large gravity well like a planet, so it is useless for interplanetary travel.

When launched, anything on substructure that's connected to the grav engine will be transported to a new map.

Gravhulks are the pride of glitterworld infrastructure fleets, often used to deploy prefabricated settlements, floating arcologies, or deep-strata excavation hubs. Their sheer scale demands enormous production facilities and crew specialization, making them one of the rarest and most powerful gravships ever built.
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.label: gravhulk engine
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.description:
A compact gravtech engine designed for short-range jumps within a planet’s atmosphere. The gravjumper engine creates a brief, localized distortion in gravitational flow, allowing rapid vertical lift, but does not produce forward thrust. It can't function far from a large gravity well like a planet, so it is useless for interplanetary travel.

When launched, anything on substructure that's connected to the grav engine will be transported to a new map.

Often used by explorers, scouts, and smugglers, gravjumper engines are prized for their agility and minimal power requirements. They are simpler to produce than full gravship engines, but still rely on high-grade materials and advanced fabrication.
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.label: gravjumper engine
LanguageData.VGE_GravFieldAmplifier.description: An advanced ultratech device that dramatically increases the size of a gravship. It extends the area in which substructure can be built, and increases the amount of substructure that a gravship can support. Must be built near a grav engine. A gravship can support up to four grav field amplifiers.
LanguageData.VGE_GravFieldAmplifier.label: Gravitationsfeldverstärker
LanguageData.VGE_CommsTerminal.description: A compact version of a comms console that allows radio contact with other factions and orbital traders. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CommsTerminal.label: Kommunikationsterminal
LanguageData.VGE_CrewBunkBed.description: A compact double-tiered bed designed for gravship use. Maximizes limited space by allowing two crew members to rest in the footprint of one bed.
LanguageData.VGE_CrewBunkBed.label: crew bunk bed
LanguageData.VGE_CrewLockers.description: A set of compact lockers designed for gravship crew quarters. Provides a sEinkaufszentrum comfort bonus to all nearby bunk beds. Placing more than one locker near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.VGE_CrewLockers.label: crew lockers
LanguageData.VGE_FauxPlant.description: Eine künstliche Pflanze in einem stabilen Metalltopf. Es benötigt kein Licht, kein Wasser oder Luft und eignet sich daher perfekt, um selbst den unwirtlichsten Gravitationsumgebungen Schönheit zu verleihen.
LanguageData.VGE_FauxPlant.label: Kunstpflanze
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipShelf.description: A reinforced storage shelf designed for use aboard gravships. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipShelf.label: Gravship-Regal
LanguageData.VGE_MedbayBed.description: A specialized gravship bed equipped with an integrated vitals monitor. Designed for medbays, it improves medical outcomes over normal beds. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_MedbayBed.label: medbay bed
LanguageData.VGE_SealantGoop.description: A hardened mass of rapidly-expanding polymer foam. Produced by a sealant popper, it forms an airtight plug that seals breaches in gravship rooms exposed to vacuum. While effective at restoring pressure, it is brittle and easy to destroy.
LanguageData.VGE_SealantGoop.label: sealant goop
LanguageData.VGE_SealantPopper.description: When it detects vacuum levels above 25%, this safety device pops and releases a fast-expanding sealant goo. The substance quickly solidifies, sealing gaps and breaches to restore pressure in the room. Can also be triggered manually.
LanguageData.VGE_SealantPopper.label: Dichtmittel-Popper
LanguageData.VGE_WallFirefoamPopper.description: A wall-mounted variant of the firefoam popper. When it detects fire, it bursts and sprays fire-retardant foam in a circular area around itself. Can also be triggered manually.
LanguageData.VGE_WallFirefoamPopper.label: Wand-Schaumstoff-Popper
LanguageData.VGE_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.description: A wall-mounted version of an orbital trade beacon, required for orbital trading. You can only sell goods to orbital traders if they're near an orbital trade beacon. Can be placed indoors.
LanguageData.VGE_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.label: Wand-Orbital-Handelssignal
LanguageData.VGE_CopilotConsole.description: An auxiliary interface that allows a copilot to assist in launching and piloting a gravship. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CopilotConsole.label: Copilot-Konsole
LanguageData.VGE_PilotBridge.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravhulk. It draws power directly from the gravhulk engine.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotBridge.label: Lotsenbrücke
LanguageData.VGE_PilotCockpit.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravjumper. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotCockpit.label: Pilotencockpit
LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.description: A specialized thermal sink that draws all residual heat from the grav engine, instantly clearing its coaltown. The absorbed heat leaves the gravheat absorber inoperable for an extended period while it safely dissipates the stored energy. Furthermore, the specialized design provides protection from the heat of solar flares encountered in space, preventing excessive heat from bleeding into the gravship's interior.
LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.label: Gravitationsabsorber
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.description: A large thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine coaltown duration. A gravship can support up to six large heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.label: großer Kühlkörper
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.description: A compact thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine coaltown duration. A gravship can support up to ten salt heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.label: sEinkaufszentrum Kühlkörper
LanguageData.VGE_CompactBiosculpterPod.description: Eine miniaturisierte Version der Bioskulpturenkapsel, die so konzipiert ist, dass sie in die engen Räume eines Gravschiffs passt. Es führt eine Vielzahl biologischer Veränderungen durch, darunter Altersumkehr und Freude. Der Pod stellt sich am Ende eines Zyklus auf seinen Benutzer ein. Während es biotuniert ist, kann es von niemand anderem verwendet werden, aber die Zyklen werden 25 % schneller abgeschlossen. Biotuning wird zurückgesetzt, wenn der Pod 80 Tage lang nicht verwendet wird. Es bezieht seine Energie direkt vom Gravitationsmotor.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactBiosculpterPod.label: Kompakter Biosculpter-Pod
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_MassDriver.label: mass driver shot
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.descripti: A heavy pulse-charged weapon for mechanoid defense.
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.label: heavy charge annihilator
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_MassDriver.label: mass driver
LanguageData.VGE_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.description: A heavy pulse-charged weapon, designed for sustained suppressive fire in defense of mechanoid orbital platforms. Its upgraded capacitors and cooling systems allow it to unleash longer, more devastating bursts than standard charge blasters, saturating entire areas with surprisingly accurate shots.
LanguageData.VGE_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.label: heavy charge annihilator
LanguageData.VGE_LargeMechanoidThruster.description: A massive astrofuel thruster built by the mechanoid core to propel their orbital platforms. Its construction mirrors human design but is reinforced with mechanical precision and efficiency, lined with thick vacstone plating that shrugs off extreme heat and stress. These thrusters allow mechanoid platforms to maneuver and maintain position in orbit. While unusable for human gravships, destroying one will yield a sEinkaufszentrum supply of precious vacstone blocks.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeMechanoidThruster.label: großes mechanisches Triebwerk
LanguageData.VGE_MassDriver.description: A triple-barrel electromagnetic artillery system built into mechanoid defense platforms. It fires dense slugs at incredible velocities, tearing through both armored gravships in orbit and ground targets with equal ease. The weapon is fully autonomous, operated by a machine brain that requires no crew. Commonly seen on orbital bombardment platforms.
LanguageData.VGE_MassDriver.label: mass driver
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidAstrofuelNode.description: A compact fuel reservoir integrated into mechanoid platforms. It stores refined astrofuel for their systems, but when damaged it is highly unstable and prone to violent explosions.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidAstrofuelNode.label: Astrotreibstoffknoten
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidGravEngine.description: The calt, artificial heart of a mechanoid orbital platform. Unlike human-built grav engines, these are constructed by the mechanoid core itself, optimized for ruthless efficiency and unending operation. They generate immense lift and stabilization fields that allow entire platforms to remain suspended in orbit, forming the backbone of mechanoid dominance in space. While largely incompatible with human systems and not usable for gravship construction, they can be destroyed to yield a gravcore, a rare and valuable prize for any who dare to challenge them.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidGravEngine.label: mechanoider Gravitationsmotor
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidPodLauncher.description: A mechanized launch bay that periodically fires drop pods packed with mechanoids. These pods strike distant targets or nearby ships, allowing the platform to project its forces far beyond its hull.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidPodLauncher.label: Mechanoiden-Pod-Werfer
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidResourceProcessor.descripti: A machine-built structure that sustains mechanoid platforms by breaking down cosmic debris and wreckage into usable resources. It operates at regular intervals, steadily producing metals and fuels needed to keep their orbiting stronghalts supplied.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidResourceProcessor.label: Ressourcenprozessor
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidTempShield.description: A compact defense unit that projects a localized shield around itself. The barrier activates only for a short time before collapsing, after which the device must cool down before it can deploy again.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidTempShield.label: Mechanoider Temperaturschild
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Gold.description: Galt-rich strata crushed and recrystallized into a tight, resilient vein. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Gold.label: compressed galt ore
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Jade.description: Jade-bearing vacstone compacted into a rigid, fine-grained mass. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Jade.label: compressed jade
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Plasteel.description: Ultra-dense plasteel conglomerate formed in vacuum over generations; brutally tough to mine. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Plasteel.label: compressed plasteel
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Silver.description: Silver-bearing rock compacted under extreme pressure into a dense, uniform seam. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Silver.label: compressed silver ore
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Steel.description: uralt structural mass fused into a single, ultra-dense vacstone-steel deposit. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Steel.label: compressed steel
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Uranium.description: Uranium-laden rock sintered into a nearly monolithic deposit, difficult to fracture. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Uranium.label: compressed uranium ore
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Vacstone.description: An ultra-dense mass of asteroid rock and dust, compacted over millennia into a near-indestructible block. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Vacstone.label: compressed vacstone
LanguageData.VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.description: A massive gravtech reactor that channels and amplifies gravitational wave energy into immense electrical output. Its reinforced coils can handle extreme flux, making it one of the most potent power sources available for gravships. Adjacent gravcore power cells will multiply the power output by 15% for each gravcore power cell.
LanguageData.VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.label: Gravcore-Leistungsspule
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipCapacitor.description: Stores high amounts of electricity for later use. Constructed in the gravship substructure, gravship capacitors do not obstruct movement.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipCapacitor.label: Gravship-Kondensator
LanguageData.VGE_SolarPanelling.description: Produces electricity from sunlight. Does not work in the dark or under artificial light. Does not obstruct movement or provide cover, but can only be constructed on the gravship substructure.
LanguageData.VGE_SolarPanelling.label: Sonnenkollektoren
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMultiAnalyzer.description: A miniaturized version of the multi-analyzer, designed to work aboard a gravship. While taking up less space, it performs the same essential function: increasing research speed when placed near a high-tech research bench and unlocking advanced projects. Each bench can only benefit from one multi-analyzer. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMultiAnalyzer.label: compact multi-analyzer
LanguageData.VGE_CompactResearchBench.description: A miniaturized version of the high-tech research bench, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. Despite its compact size, it features the same computers and electronic equipment, providing the same research capabilities and unlocking advanced projects as its larger counterpart. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactResearchBench.label: compact research bench
LanguageData.VGE_FlightComputer.description: An advanced computational unit that optimizes data collection during gravship travel. Increases the amount of gravdata gained from each launch.
LanguageData.VGE_FlightComputer.label: Flugcomputer
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBlackBox.description: An indestructible advanced recorder integrated into the gravship’s systems. It greatly increases gravdata yield, captures any overflow that would norEinkaufszentrumy be wasted, and allows stored gravdata to be converted directly into research points. A gravship can support only one black box.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBlackBox.label: Gravship-Blackbox
LanguageData.VGE_GravtechConsole.description: An interface used to analyze gravdata gathered from gravship launches and travel. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravtechConsole.label: Gravtech-Konsole
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipScannerCluster.description: An advanced multi-frequency sensor cluster used by researchers to detect resources underground, across the planet, or in orbit. The scanner can be tuned to target specific minerals underground, or over long range, or set to scan for orbital objects. Detection rates depend on the operator's research ability. Buried resources will require deep drills to extract, while distant mineral deposits and orbital objects must be visited to be collected. Building multiple units does not increase the frequency of orbital detections. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipScannerCluster.label: gravship scanner cluster
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStructuralBeam.description: A structural beam around which a gravship can be constructed. It extends the area in which substructure can be built in a 5x5 square. If destroyed, it causes adjacent beams to collapse.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStructuralBeam.label: gravship structural beam
LanguageData.VGE_CapacitorHarmonizer.description: A specialized device that balances and synchronizes energy flow between nearby capacitors. It passively boosts their charge and discharge efficiency to peak performance. Requires power to operate.
LanguageData.VGE_CapacitorHarmonizer.label: Kondensatorharmonisator
LanguageData.VGE_Gravlift.description: A complex vertical launch and stabilization platform integrated into the gravship’s core structure. The gravlift provides the immense thrust required for vertical takeoff from planetary surfaces and stabilizes orbital insertion, allowing the gravship to remain suspended in space. It also softens the crash landing greatly, reducing the damage taken and ensuring substructure does not suffer critical damage.
LanguageData.VGE_Gravlift.label: Gravlift
LanguageData.VGE_GunnerSubpersonaCore.description: A low-grade subpersona specialized in gravship combat. It can link with a single gravship artillery piece and control it the same way a crewmember manning a targeting terminal can. It's combat capabilities are beyond that of even the best human gunner. A gravship can support up to two gunner subpersona cores.
LanguageData.VGE_GunnerSubpersonaCore.label: Gunner Subpersona Core
LanguageData.VGE_MaintenanceHub.description: A centralized system that optimizes and automates routine upkeep across the gravship. It passively reduces the maintenance decay rate of all connected machinery. Requires power to work.
LanguageData.VGE_MaintenanceHub.label: Wartungszentrum
LanguageData.VGE_VacBarrierDouble.label: vac barrier (2x1)
LanguageData.VGE_VacBarrierQuintuple.label: vac barrier (5x1)
LanguageData.VGE_VacBarrierTriple.label: vac barrier (3x1)
LanguageData.VGE_VacCheckpoint.description: A safety checkpoint indicating the entrance to vacuum environment. Colonists will not cross it without required vacuum resistance.
LanguageData.VGE_VacCheckpoint.label: vac checkpoint
LanguageData.VGE_Filth_Astrofuel.label: astrofuel puddle
LanguageData.VGE_Filth_DamagedSubstructure.label: damaged substructure debris
LanguageData.VGE_Astrofuel.description: A high-energy synthetic fuel. Used to power gravship thrusters and boosters, or to generate electricity in specialized systems. Extremely combustible, it burns violently even in low-oxygen environments.
LanguageData.VGE_Astrofuel.label: astrofuel
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanister.description: A life-sustaining gas. Used to pressurize rooms, supply breathable air, or fuel specialized equipment and survival gear. Volatile when damaged.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanister.label: oxygen canister
LanguageData.VGE_Oxyalgae.description: A dense mat of harvested aquatic algae, cultivated for use in life support systems. Oxyalgae provides steady oxygen generation but spoils quickly if not processed.
LanguageData.VGE_Oxyalgae.label: oxyalgae
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenOxygenPipe.description: A verborgen, reinforced tube for moving oxygen around. While it’s not visible, it is much more expensive to construct.
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenOxygenPipe.label: verborgen oxygen pipe
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialOxygenPump.description: A powerful unit that releases large amounts of oxygen into the surrounding room, allowing enclosed areas to repressurize in space. Essential for long stays in orbit.
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialOxygenPump.label: industrial oxygen pump
LanguageData.VGE_LargeOxygenTank.description: Ein großer Sauerstofftank, der die Pumpen im gesamten Gravschiff mit Sauerstoff versorgt.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeOxygenTank.label: großer Sauerstofftank
LanguageData.VGE_LifeSupportSystem.description: Ein lebenswichtiges Gerät, das geerntete Oxyalgen in atembaren Sauerstoff umwandelt. Wandelt Biomasse in Gas um und pumpt es in das Sauerstoffnetz, um Räume und Geräte unter Druck zu versorgen.
LanguageData.VGE_LifeSupportSystem.label: Algen-Oxygenator
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterEmptier.description: A hopper-like storage structure meant to input oxygen from canisters into the network, filling up connected tanks.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterEmptier.label: oxygen canister emptier
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterFiller.description: A hopper-like storage device meant to halt dispensed oxygen in canisters for use later.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterFiller.label: oxygen canister filler
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenHarvester.description: Ein Gerät, das atembaren Sauerstoff aus der umgebenden Atmosphäre ansaugt und ihn im Sauerstoffnetzwerk speichert. Es funktioniert nur auf Planetenoberflächen mit einer Atmosphäre und funktioniert nicht im Vakuum oder in Umgebungen mit niedrigem Sauerstoffgehalt.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenHarvester.label: Sauerstoff-Harvester
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenPipe.description: A reinforced tube for moving oxygen around. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenPipe.label: Sauerstoffrohr
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenReclaimer.description: Eine in sich geschlossene atmosphärische Einheit, die den umgebenden Gasen Spuren von Sauerstoff entzieht. Es produziert langsam und gleichmäßig Sauerstoff, erfordert jedoch keine Einsatzstoffe. Damit es funktioniert, muss es über Sauerstoffleitungen an einen Sauerstofftank angeschlossen werden.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenReclaimer.label: Sauerstoffrückgewinner
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenValve.description: Switches oxygen flow on and off.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenValve.label: oxygen valve
LanguageData.VGE_SmallOxygenTank.description: Ein Sauerstofftank, der die Pumpen im gesamten Gravschiff mit Sauerstoff versorgt.
LanguageData.VGE_SmallOxygenTank.label: sEinkaufszentrum Sauerstofftank
LanguageData.VGE_OxyalgaePlant.description: A fast-growing aquatic plant cultivated in hydroponics and used to generate oxygen when converted in algae oxygenator. Rots quickly when harvested, making immediate processing essential.
LanguageData.VGE_OxyalgaePlant.label: Oxyalgenpflanze
LanguageData.VGE_Astronaut.description: Ein mittelgroßer Mechanoid, der für Bau- und Brandbekämpfungsaufgaben im Orbit konzipiert ist. Bei Bedarf kann es stumpfe Nahkampfangriffe ausführen. Es wird durch die langsamen Raumdurchquerungsgeschwindigkeiten nicht beeinträchtigt.
LanguageData.VGE_Astronaut.label: Astronaut
LanguageData.VGE_Astronaut.tools.0.label: Torso
LanguageData.VGE_Astropede.description: Heavily armored mechanoids adapted for zero-G warfare. Astropedes drift silently through space using gravitic stabilizers, unleashing explosive kinetic barrages from their minified mass lances. Their hovering profile makes them ideal for shipboard assaults and station breaches, though their slow movement speed leaves them vulnerable to concentrated fire.
LanguageData.VGE_Astropede.label: astropede
LanguageData.VGE_Hunter.description: A fast, human-sized combat mechanoid designed for zero-gravity warfare. It drifts effortlessly through space, closing in on the target before unleashing devastating salvos from the twin-linked javelin launcher. While the missiles strike with lethal precision, their short range forces hunters into gefährlich proximity with the enemy.
LanguageData.VGE_Hunter.label: Jäger
LanguageData.VGE_Hunter.tools.0.label: Kopf
LanguageData.VGE_MassLance.description: A mechanoid-mounted portable mass driver artillery. It fires dense slugs at incredible velocities, capable of destroying even heavily armored gravships.
LanguageData.VGE_MassLance.label: mass lance
LanguageData.VGE_MassLance.tools.0.label: Fass
LanguageData.VGE_RocketswarmPod.description: A mechanoid-mounted, minified, twin-linked rocketswarm launcher. It is very effective against large groups of weaker combatants, but less effective against sEinkaufszentrum numbers of armored targets.
LanguageData.VGE_RocketswarmPod.label: rocketswarm pod
LanguageData.VGE_RocketswarmPod.tools.0.label: Fass
LanguageData.VGE_LargeAsteroid.label: large asteroid
LanguageData.VGE_LargeDebris.label: large debris
LanguageData.VGE_MediumAsteroid.label: medium asteroid
LanguageData.VGE_MediumDebris.label: medium debris
LanguageData.VGE_SmallAsteroid_Projectile.label: sEinkaufszentrum asteroid
LanguageData.VGE_SmallDebris.label: sEinkaufszentrum debris
LanguageData.VGE_Astrofire.label: astrofire
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofireSpark.label: astrofire spark
LanguageData.VGE_LandingStructure.label: landing structure
LanguageData.VQEA_Bullet_HellsphereCannonGun.label: Höllenkugel-Kanonenschuss
LanguageData.VQEA_Apparel_PatientGown.description: alt und robuster Patientenkittel. Bietet keinen Schutz oder Isolierung, erleichtert aber die medizinischen Eingriffe an einer Person, die es trägt, ein wenig.
LanguageData.VQEA_Apparel_PatientGown.label: Patientenkittel
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientLaboratoryCasket.description: Eine versiegelte Forschungskapsel, in der einst menschliche Testpersonen untergebracht waren. Beim Öffnen kann es passieren, dass jemand oder was auch immer darin freigelassen wird, freigelassen wird.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientLaboratoryCasket.label: uralt Laborschatulle
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientLaboratoryCasket_Empty.descr: Eine leere Forschungskapsel, in der einst menschliche Testpersonen untergebracht waren.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientLaboratoryCasket_Empty.label: leerer uralt Laborsarg
LanguageData.VQEA_CandidateCryptosleepCasket.descript: Eine spezielle Kryptoschlafkammer, die einst dazu diente, bestimmte ideale Testpersonen für Experimente aufzubewahren. Es summt immer noch leise vor Kraft und haltet etwas, das in seinem Inneren schlummert.
LanguageData.VQEA_CandidateCryptosleepCasket.label: Kandidat-Cryptosleep-Sarg
LanguageData.VQEA_CandidateCryptosleepCasket_Empty.de: Eine spezielle Kryptoschlafkammer, die einst dazu diente, bestimmte ideale Testpersonen für Experimente aufzubewahren. Es steht jetzt leer.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientFauxPlant.description: Eine gefälschte Dekopflanze, die dazu dient, sterile Räume aufzuhellen. Es ist mit Staub bedeckt, bringt aber trotzdem ein wenig Farbe mit.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientFauxPlant.label: uralt Kunstpflanze
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientHospitalArmchair.description: Ein bequemer Stuhl, der in alt Wartezimmern von Krankenhäusern verwendet wird. Die Polsterung ist abgenutzt, aber überraschend intakt.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientHospitalArmchair.label: uralt Krankenhaussessel
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientHospitalBench.description: Eine einfache Bank für Patienten oder Besucher. Es ist alt, robust und seltsam bequem.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientHospitalBench.label: uralt Krankenhausbank
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientHospitalCrib.description: Ein sEinkaufszentrum Metallbett, das einst im Kinderzimmer des Tresors verwendet wurde. Der Rahmen ist verrostet und die Bettwäsche ist längst verfallen.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientHospitalCrib.label: uralt Krankenhausbett
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientIncubator.description: Eine uralt Inkubationseinheit, die für medizinische Forschung oder Frühgeborene verwendet wird. Seine Systeme sind tot, aber die Hülle bleibt größtenteils intakt.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientIncubator.label: uralt Inkubator
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientIVStand.description: Ein einfacher Ständer, an dem noch lange leere Flüssigkeitsbeutel hängen. Es lieferte einst Medikamente oder Nährstoffe an Patienten.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientIVStand.label: uralt IV Stand
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientKitchenette.description: Eine kompakte Kocheinheit, die vom Laborpersonal verwendet wird. Die Oberflächen sind korrodiert und die Geräte funktionieren nicht mehr.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientKitchenette.label: uralt Küchenzeile
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientMedicalPartition.description: Eine falting-Partition, die zur Aufteilung der Patientenbereiche aus Datenschutzgründen verwendet wird. Sein Stoff ist zerrissen und mit Staub bedeckt.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientMedicalPartition.label: uralt medizinischer Abschnitt
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientOfficeDesk.description: Ein stabiler Schreibtisch, der einst einem Forscher oder Administrator gehörte. alt Datentafeln und Papiere sind immer noch unübersichtlich.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientOfficeDesk.label: uralt Büroschreibtisch
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientOfficePrinter.description: Ein alt alt Bürodrucker. Es summt leise, obwohl es unwahrscheinlich ist, dass etwas Nützliches mehr gedruckt wird.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientOfficePrinter.label: uralt Bürodrucker
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientRepairBench.description: Eine schwere Werkbank zur Wartung von Laborgeräten. Die Werkzeuge sind weg, aber die Fettflecken bleiben.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientRepairBench.label: uralt Reparaturtisch
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientResearchCountertop.descripti: Ein langer Forschungstisch, bedeckt mit verbranntem Metall und kaputten Instrumenten. Es wurde für genetische und chemische Experimente verwendet.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientResearchCountertop.label: uralt Forschungsarbeitsplatte
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientSink.description: Ein rostfleckiges Waschbecken, das einst zum Hände- oder Instrumentenwaschen diente. Durch die gerissenen Rohre fließt kein Wasser mehr.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientSink.label: Einkaufszentrum sEinkaufszentrum Senke
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientStorageHeater.description: Eine kompakte Elektroheizung aus den uralt-Laboren. Im eingeschalteten Zustand erwärmt es die Luft auf ein angenehmes Niveau.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientStorageHeater.label: uralt Speicherheizung
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientToyBox.description: Eine sEinkaufszentrum Spielzeugtruhe aus dem Kinderzimmerflügel. Es ist voller kaputter Puppen und verblasster Blöcke. Spielzeugkisten können zum Spielen mit Babys verwendet werden und so ihr Spielbedürfnis stillen.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientToyBox.label: uralt Spielzeugkiste
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientTripWarning.description: Ein verblasstes Warnschild warnt vor Gefahren. Außer der Dekoration dient es jetzt keinem wirklichen Zweck mehr.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientTripWarning.label: Reisewarnschild
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientVitalsMonitor.description: Ein Nachttischmonitor zur Überwachung der Gesundheit des Patienten. Das Display ist jetzt gesprungen und es ist irreparabel kaputt.
LanguageData.VQEA_AncientVitalsMonitor.label: uralt Vitalwertemonitor
